```sql
MET.CODIGO2 AS CODIGOENTIDADEMETA2,
MET.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
MET.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
TO_CHAR(MET.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA,
MET.VLVENDAPREV AS VALOR,
MET.QTVENDAPREV AS QUANTIDADEVENDA,
MET.PEDIDOSPREV AS QUANTIDADEPEDIDOS,
MET.MIXPREV AS MIX,
MET.MIXMEDIOPREV AS MIXMEDIO,
MET.CLIPOSPREV AS POSITIVACAO,
MET.CLICADPREV AS CLIENTECADASTRADO,
MET.QTDCLIENTESATIVO AS QUANTIDADECLIENTEATIVO,
MET.MARGEMPREV AS MARGEM,
MET.QTPESOPREV AS PESO,
MET.VOLUMEPREV AS VOLUME,
MET.DESCVLVENDAPREV AS DESCONTOVALORVENDA,
MET.EFETIVIDADEPREV AS EFETIVIDADE,
MET.EFETIVIDADEDIARIA AS EFETIVIDADEDIARIA,
MET.QTMEDIAITENS AS MEDIAITENS,
MET.MEDIAITENSCLIPREV AS MEDIAITENSCLIENTE,
MET.PERVLDEVOLPREV AS PERCENTUALVALORDEVOLUCAO,
MET.PERQTDEVOLPREV AS PERCENTUALITENSDEVOLUCAO,
MET.PERINADIMPPREV AS PERCENTUALINADIMPLENCIA,
MET.PRAZOMEDIOPREV AS PRAZOMEDIO,
MET.VLMEDIOITEM AS VALORMEDIOITEM,
MET.VLMEDIOPEDIDO AS VALORMEDIOPEDIDO,
MET.VLMEDIOPEDIDOSDIA AS VALORMEDIOPEDIDODIA,
MET.PRECOMEDIOPREV AS PRECOMEDIO,
MET.PRECOMEDIOKGPREV AS PRECOMEDIOPESO
FROM PCMETA MET
WHERE MET.TIPOMETA = 'R'
```


#### GD_FATO_METARCA

```sql
SELECT 
MET.CODIGO AS CODIGOENTIDADEMETA,
MET.CODIGO2 AS CODIGOENTIDADEMETA2,
MET.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
MET.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
TO_CHAR(MET.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA,
MET.VLVENDAPREV AS VALOR,
MET.QTVENDAPREV AS QUANTIDADEVENDA,
MET.PEDIDOSPREV AS QUANTIDADEPEDIDOS,
MET.MIXPREV AS MIX,
MET.MIXMEDIOPREV AS MIXMEDIO,
MET.CLIPOSPREV AS POSITIVACAO,
MET.CLICADPREV AS CLIENTECADASTRADO,
MET.QTDCLIENTESATIVO AS QUANTIDADECLIENTEATIVO,
MET.MARGEMPREV AS MARGEM,
MET.QTPESOPREV AS PESO,
MET.VOLUMEPREV AS VOLUME,
MET.DESCVLVENDAPREV AS DESCONTOVALORVENDA,
MET.EFETIVIDADEPREV AS EFETIVIDADE,
MET.EFETIVIDADEDIARIA AS EFETIVIDADEDIARIA,
MET.QTMEDIAITENS AS MEDIAITENS,
MET.MEDIAITENSCLIPREV AS MEDIAITENSCLIENTE,
MET.PERVLDEVOLPREV AS PERCENTUALVALORDEVOLUCAO,
MET.PERQTDEVOLPREV AS PERCENTUALITENSDEVOLUCAO,
MET.PERINADIMPPREV AS PERCENTUALINADIMPLENCIA,
MET.PRAZOMEDIOPREV AS PRAZOMEDIO,
MET.VLMEDIOITEM AS VALORMEDIOITEM,
MET.VLMEDIOPEDIDO AS VALORMEDIOPEDIDO,
MET.VLMEDIOPEDIDOSDIA AS VALORMEDIOPEDIDODIA,
MET.PRECOMEDIOPREV AS PRECOMEDIO,
MET.PRECOMEDIOKGPREV AS PRECOMEDIOPESO
FROM PCMETA MET
WHERE MET.TIPOMETA = 'M'
```


#### GD_FATO_METASECAO

```sql
SELECT 
MET.CODIGO AS CODIGOENTIDADEMETA,
MET.CODIGO2 AS CODIGOENTIDADEMETA2,
MET.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
MET.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
TO_CHAR(MET.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA,
MET.VLVENDAPREV AS VALOR,
MET.QTVENDAPREV AS QUANTIDADEVENDA,
MET.PEDIDOSPREV AS QUANTIDADEPEDIDOS,
MET.MIXPREV AS MIX,
MET.MIXMEDIOPREV AS MIXMEDIO,
MET.CLIPOSPREV AS POSITIVACAO,
MET.CLICADPREV AS CLIENTECADASTRADO,
MET.QTDCLIENTESATIVO AS QUANTIDADECLIENTEATIVO,
MET.MARGEMPREV AS MARGEM,
MET.QTPESOPREV AS PESO,
MET.VOLUMEPREV AS VOLUME,
MET.DESCVLVENDAPREV AS DESCONTOVALORVENDA,
MET.EFETIVIDADEPREV AS EFETIVIDADE,
MET.EFETIVIDADEDIARIA AS EFETIVIDADEDIARIA,
MET.QTMEDIAITENS AS MEDIAITENS,
MET.MEDIAITENSCLIPREV AS MEDIAITENSCLIENTE,
MET.PERVLDEVOLPREV AS PERCENTUALVALORDEVOLUCAO,
MET.PERQTDEVOLPREV AS PERCENTUALITENSDEVOLUCAO,
MET.PERINADIMPPREV AS PERCENTUALINADIMPLENCIA,
MET.PRAZOMEDIOPREV AS PRAZOMEDIO,
MET.VLMEDIOITEM AS VALORMEDIOITEM,
MET.VLMEDIOPEDIDO AS VALORMEDIOPEDIDO,
MET.VLMEDIOPEDIDOSDIA AS VALORMEDIOPEDIDODIA,
MET.PRECOMEDIOPREV AS PRECOMEDIO,
MET.PRECOMEDIOKGPREV AS PRECOMEDIOPESO
FROM PCMETA MET
WHERE MET.TIPOMETA = 'S'
```


#### GD_FATO_MOVIMENTACAOWMS

```sql
SELECT 
MOV.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
MOV.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
MOV.CODENDERECO AS CODIGOENDERECO,
MOV.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
MOV.NUMOS AS NUMEROOS, 
MOV.NUMBONUS AS NUMEROBONUS,
MOV.NUMCAR AS NUMEROCARREGAMENTO,
MOV.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUMEROTRANSVENDA,
MOV.CODMOTIVO AS CODIGOMOVITODEVOLUCAO,
MOV.CODFUNCEMBALADOR AS CODIGOEMBALADOR,
MOV.CODFUNCCOFERENTE AS CODIGOCONFERENTE,
MOV.CODFUNCOS AS CODIGOSEPARADOR,
TO_CHAR(MOV.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAGERACAOOS,
TO_CHAR(MOV.DTINICIOOS, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIOOS,
TO_CHAR(MOV.DTFIMOS, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFIMOS,
MOV.QT AS QUANTIDADE,
PRO.PESOBRUTO AS PESOBRUTO,
PRO.PESOLIQ AS PESOLIQUIDO,
PRO.VOLUME AS VOLUME
FROM PCMOVENDPEND MOV
LEFT JOIN PCENDERECO END ON END.CODENDERECO = MOV.CODENDERECO
LEFT JOIN PCPRODUT PRO ON PRO.CODPROD = MOV.CODPROD
WHERE MOV.DTINICIOOS IS NOT NULL
  AND MOV.DTFIMOS IS NOT NULL
  AND MOV.DTESTORNO IS NULL
   AND MOV.NUMOS IS NOT NULL
AND TO_CHAR(MOV.DATA, 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -240), 'YYYY')
```


#### GD_FATO_ORCAMENTO

```sql
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/01/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes01 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/02/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes02 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN 
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/03/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes03 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN 
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/04/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes04 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN 
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/05/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes05 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN 
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/06/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes06 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN 
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/07/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes07 VALOR  FROM PCORCLAN
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/08/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes08 VALOR  FROM PCORCLAN
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/09/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes09 VALOR  FROM PCORCLAN
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/10/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes10 VALOR  FROM PCORCLAN 
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/11/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes11 VALOR FROM PCORCLAN
UNION
SELECT CODFILIAL, CODCONTA, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/12/'||ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') DATA, vlorcmes12 VALOR  FROM PCORCLAN
```


#### GD_FATO_ORCAMENTOCENTROCUSTO

```sql
SELECT 
ORC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
ORC.CODCONTA AS CODIGOCONTA,
ORC.CODIGOCENTROCUSTO,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('01/'||ORC.MES||'/'||ORC.ANO, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS  DATA,
ORC.VALOR,
ORC.PERCRATEIO AS PERCENTUALRATEIO
FROM PCORCLANCENTROCUSTO ORC
```


#### GD_FATO_ORDEMSERVICO

```sql
SELECT 
MOV.NUMOS AS NUMEROOS, 
TO_CHAR(MOV.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAGERACAOOS,
CASE WHEN MOV.NUMPED = 0 THEN NULL ELSE MOV.NUMPED END AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
CASE WHEN MOV.NUMCAR = 0 THEN NULL ELSE MOV.NUMCAR END AS NUMEROCARREGAMENTO,
TO_CHAR(MIN(MOV.DTINICIOOS), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIOOS, 
TO_CHAR(MAX(MOV.DTFIMOS), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFIMOS, 
TO_CHAR(MAX(MOV.DTFIMSEPARACAO), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFIMSEPARACAO,
TO_CHAR(MIN(MOV.DTINICIOCONFERENCIA), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIOCONFERENCIA, 
TO_CHAR(MIN(MOV.DTFIMCONFERENCIA), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFIMCONFERENCIA 
FROM PCMOVENDPEND MOV
INNER JOIN PCENDERECO END ON END.CODENDERECO = MOV.CODENDERECO
WHERE TO_CHAR(MOV.DATA, 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -24), 'YYYY')
GROUP BY MOV.NUMOS, MOV.DATA, MOV.POSICAO, MOV.DTESTORNO, MOV.CODOPER, MOV.NUMPED, MOV.NUMTRANSVENDA, MOV.NUMCAR
```


#### GD_FATO_PEDIDOVENDADEVOLUCAO

```sql
SELECT PED.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
PED.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
PED.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
PED.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
TO_CHAR(PED.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENDA,
TO_CHAR(DEV.DTESTORNO, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAESTORNO,
DEV.VLDEVOLUCAO AS VALORDEVOLUCAO
FROM PCESTCOM DEV
INNER JOIN PCPEDC PED ON PED.NUMTRANSVENDA = DEV.NUMTRANSVENDA
```


#### GD_FATO_PEDIDOVENDAIMPERFEITO

```sql
SELECT -- Devolução de Pedidos
   PED.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
   PED.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
   PED.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
   PED.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
   TO_CHAR(PED.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENDA,

   -1 AS NUMEROTRANSACAOVENDA,
   -1 AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
   -1 AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO,
   '' AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,

   TO_CHAR(DEV.DTESTORNO, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAESTORNO,
   DEV.VLDEVOLUCAO AS VALORDEVOLUCAO,

   '' AS DATAFALTA,
   0 AS QUANTIDADE,
   0 AS PRECOVENDAUNITARIO,

   -1 AS CODIGOFUNCIONARIO,
   0 AS QUANTIDADESEPARADA,
   0 AS QUANTIDADECORTADA,
   '' AS DATACORTE,
   '' AS MOTIVOCORTE,
   0 AS PRECOVENDA
FROM PCESTCOM DEV
     INNER JOIN PCPEDC PED ON PED.NUMTRANSVENDA = DEV.NUMTRANSVENDA
--WHERE TO_CHAR(PED.DATA  , 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -96), 'YYYY')

UNION ALL

SELECT -- Falta de Pedidos
   FAL.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
   PED.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
   PED.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
   PED.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
   TO_CHAR(PED.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENDA,

   PED.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUMEROTRANSACAOVENDA,
   FAL.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
   PED.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO,
   PED.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,

   '' AS DATAESTORNO,
   0 AS VALORDEVOLUCAO,

   TO_CHAR(FAL.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFALTA,
   FAL.QT AS QUANTIDADE,
   FAL.PVENDA AS PRECOVENDAUNITARIO,

   -1 AS CODIGOFUNCIONARIO,
   0 AS QUANTIDADESEPARADA,
   0 AS QUANTIDADECORTADA,
   '' AS DATACORTE,
   '' AS MOTIVOCORTE,
   0 AS PRECOVENDA
FROM PCFALTA FAL
     INNER JOIN PCPEDC PED ON PED.NUMPED = FAL.NUMPED
WHERE PED.CONDVENDA NOT IN (10)

UNION ALL

SELECT -- Corte de Pedidos
   NFS.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
   CORI.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
   CORI.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
   CORI.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
   TO_CHAR(NFS.DTSAIDA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENDA,

   NFS.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUMEROTRANSACAOVENDA,
   CORI.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
   NFS.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO,
   NFS.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,

   '' AS DATAESTORNO,
   0 AS VALORDEVOLUCAO,

   '' AS DATAFALTA,
   0 AS QUANTIDADE,
   0 AS PRECOVENDAUNITARIO,

   CORI.CODFUNC AS  CODIGOFUNCIONARIO,
   CORI.QTSEPARADA AS QUANTIDADESEPARADA,
   CORI.QTCORTADA AS QUANTIDADECORTADA,
   TO_CHAR(CORI.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATACORTE,
   CORI.MOTIVO AS MOTIVOCORTE,
   CORI.PVENDA AS PRECOVENDA
FROM PCCORTEI CORI
     LEFT JOIN PCNFSAID NFS ON NFS.NUMPED = CORI.NUMPED
--WHERE TO_CHAR(CORI.DATA  , 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -96), 'YYYY');
```


#### GD_FATO_PRODUTO

```sql
SELECT 
PCPRODUT.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,                                            
CAST( NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA1, 0) AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS VALORUNITARIOVENDA,
CAST( NVL(PCPRODUT.TEMREPOS, 0) AS NUMERIC(8,0))  AS TEMPOREPOSICAO,
CAST( NVL(PCFORNEC.PRAZOENTREGA, 0) AS NUMERIC(8,0)) AS PRAZOENTREGA,
PCTABPR.MARGEM AS MARGEMIDEAL,
TO_CHAR(PCPRODUT.DTCADASTRO, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATACADASTRO,
CAST( ROUND(SYSDATE - NVL(PCPRODUT.DTCADASTRO, SYSDATE), 0) AS NUMERIC(8,0))  AS DIASCADASTRO,
PCTABPR.PERDESCMAXTAB AS DESCONTOMAXIMO,
PCTABPR.PERDESCMAXTABBALCAO AS DESCONTOMAXIMOBALCAO,
PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO AS PESOBRUTO,
PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ AS PESOLIQUIDO,
PCPRODUT.VOLUME AS VOLUME,
PCPRODUT.QTUNIT AS QUANTIDADEUNITARIA,
PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX AS QUANTIDADEUNITARIACAIXA
FROM PCPRODUT, PCTABPR, PCFORNEC  
 WHERE PCPRODUT.CODPROD = PCTABPR.CODPROD
 AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
 AND PCTABPR.NUMREGIAO IN (1)
```


#### GD_FATO_PRODUTOAVARIA

```sql
SELECT
  PA.CODAVARIA AS CodigoAvaria,
  PA.CODFILIAL AS CodigoFilial,
  PA.CODFORNEC AS CodigoFornecedor,
  PA.CODFUNCLANC AS CodigoFuncaoLancamento,
  PA.CODMOTIVOAVARIA AS CodigoMotivoAvaria,
  PA.CODPROD AS CodigoProduto,
  TO_CHAR(PA.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA,
  PA.QT AS Quantidade
FROM PCPRODAVARIA PA
```


#### GD_FATO_RATEIOCENTROCUSTO

```sql
SELECT
RATEIO.RECNUM AS NUMEROLANCAMENTO,
RATEIO.CODCONTA AS CODIGOCONTA,
RATEIO.CODIGOCENTROCUSTO AS CODIGOCENTROCUSTO,
PCLANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(RATEIO.DTLANC,'YYYY') >= '1900' THEN TO_CHAR(RATEIO.DTLANC,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE NULL END) AS DATALANCAMENTO,
(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(PCLANC.DTVENC,'YYYY') >= '1900' THEN TO_CHAR(PCLANC.DTVENC,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE NULL END) AS DATAVENCIMENTO,
(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(PCLANC.DTLANC,'YYYY') >= '1900' THEN TO_CHAR(PCLANC.DTLANC,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE NULL END) AS DATATITULO,
(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(PCLANC.DTPAGTO,'YYYY') >= '1900' THEN TO_CHAR(PCLANC.DTPAGTO,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE NULL END) AS DATAPAGAMENTO,
PCLANC.NUMBANCO AS NUMEROBANCO,
CASE 
     WHEN PCLANC.TIPOPARCEIRO = 'F' THEN ('F'||TRIM(TO_CHAR(PCLANC.CODFORNEC,'000000000'))) 
     WHEN PCLANC.TIPOPARCEIRO = 'C' THEN ('C'||TRIM(TO_CHAR(PCLANC.CODFORNEC,'000000000')))
     WHEN PCLANC.TIPOPARCEIRO = 'R' THEN ('R'||TRIM(TO_CHAR(PCLANC.CODFORNEC,'000000000')))
     ELSE '0'
END AS CODIGOPARCEIRO,
RATEIO.PERCRATEIO AS PERCRATEIO,
RATEIO.VALOR AS VALORRATEIO
FROM PCRATEIOCENTROCUSTO RATEIO
LEFT JOIN PCLANC ON RATEIO.RECNUM = PCLANC.RECNUM
```


#### GD_FATO_ROTACLIENTE

```sql
SELECT ROT.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
ROT.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
ROT.DIASEMANA
FROM PCROTACLI ROT
```


#### GD_FATO_SAIDAINVENTARIO

```sql
SELECT
  PCMOV.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
  PCMOV.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  PCMOV.CODFORNEC AS CODIGOFORNECEDOR,
  TO_CHAR(PCMOV.DTMOV, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAMOVIMENTACAO,
  NVL(PCMOV.QT, 0) AS QUANTIDADE,
  NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT, 0) AS VALORUNITARIO,
  NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN, 0) AS VALORUNITARIOCUSTO,
  NVL(PCMOV.QT, 0) * NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN, 0) AS VALORCUSTOTOTAL,
  NVL(PCMOV.PESOLIQ, 0) AS PESOUNITARIOLIQUIDO,
  NVL(PCMOV.PESOBRUTO, 0) AS PESOUNITARIOBRUTO,
  NVL(PCMOV.VOLUME, 0) AS VOLUMEUNITARIO
FROM PCMOV
WHERE
  PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SI'
  AND TO_CHAR(PCMOV.DTMOV, 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -96), 'YYYY')
```


#### GD_FATO_SALDOBANCARIO

```sql
SELECT 
PCESTCR.CODBANCO AS CODIGOBANCO, 
PCESTCR.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA, 
PCBANCO.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
PCESTCR.VALOR AS SALDO
FROM PCESTCR
INNER JOIN PCBANCO ON PCESTCR.CODBANCO = PCBANCO.CODBANCO               
WHERE   
PCESTCR.CODCOB IN ( 'D', 'APLI')
```


#### GD_FATO_TABELAPRECO

```sql
SELECT  
TAB.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
TAB.NUMREGIAO AS NUMEROREGIAO,
TAB.PTABELA AS PRECOTABELA,
TAB.PVENDA AS PRECOVENDA,
TAB.PTABELA1 AS PRECOTABELA1,
TAB.PTABELA2 AS PRECOTABELA2,
TAB.PTABELA3 AS PRECOTABELA3,
TAB.PTABELA4 AS PRECOTABELA4,
TAB.PTABELA5 AS PRECOTABELA5,
TAB.VLST AS VALORST,
TRI.IVA AS VALORIVA,
TRI.PAUTA AS VALORPAUTA
FROM PCTABPR TAB
LEFT JOIN PCTRIBUT TRI ON TAB.CODST = TRI.CODST
```


#### GD_FATO_VARIACAOPATRIMONIAL

```sql
SELECT  
  '1-SALDO CAIXA' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOCX AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '2-SALDO BANCARIO' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOBCO AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '3-SALDO VALE' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOVALE AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '4-SALDO EMPRESTIMO A RECEBER' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOEMPRESTATIVO AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '5-SALDO CONTA TRANSITORIA' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOCTRANS AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '6-SALDO CONTA A RECEBER' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOCR AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '7-SALDO CONTA A RECEBER FORNECEDOR' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOCRFOR AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '8-SALDO ESTOQUE' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOESTFIN AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '9-SALDO INVESTIMENTO ATIVO' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOINVESTATIVO AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '10-SALDO ADIANTAMENTO FORNECEDOR' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOADIANTFOR AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '11-FORNECEDOR MERC.' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOCP AS SALDO
FROM PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '12 EMPRÉSTIMO PASSIVO' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOEMPRESTPASSIVO AS SALDO
FROM  PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '13-CREDITO CLIENTE' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOCREDCLI AS SALDO
FROM     
    PCFINANC

UNION ALL

SELECT  
  '14-SALDO INVESTIMENTO PASSIVO' AS INDICADOR,
  PCFINANC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA+1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAINICIAL,
  TO_CHAR(DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFINAL,
  PCFINANC.SALDOINVESTPASSIVO AS SALDO
FROM  PCFINANC
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDA

```sql
SELECT 
PCPEDI.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
PCPEDC.CODSUPERVISOR AS CODIGOSUPERVISOR,
PCPEDI.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE, 
PCPEDC.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
PCPEDI.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
PCPEDC.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOFORMAPAGAMENTO,
PCPEDC.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,
PCPEDI.BONIFIC AS CODIGOTIPOITEMVENDA, 
PCPEDC.CODEMITENTE AS CODIGOEMITENTE,
PCPEDI.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO, 
PCPEDC.NUMCAR AS NUMEROCARREGAMENTO,
TO_CHAR(PCPEDC.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENDA,
TO_CHAR(PCPEDC.DTENTREGA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAENTREGA,
PCPEDI.QT AS QUANTIDADE,
       
       CAST( DECODE (PCPEDC.CONDVENDA,
               5, 0,
               6, 0,
               11, 0,
               12, 0,
               NVL ((  NVL (PCPEDI.PVENDA, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLFRETE, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLOUTRASDESP, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLOUTROS, 0)
                    ),
                    0
                   )
              ) AS NUMERIC(18,6) ) AS VALORUNITARIO,

CAST(DECODE(PCPEDC.CONDVENDA,5,PCPEDI.PTABELA) AS NUMERIC(18,6)) ValorUnitarioBonificado,
CAST(DECODE(PCPEDC.CONDVENDA,5,PCPEDI.QT) AS NUMERIC(18,6)) QuantidadeBonificada,

       CAST( DECODE (PCPEDC.CONDVENDA,
               5, 0,
               6, 0,
               11, 0,
               12, 0,
               NVL ((  NVL (PCPEDI.PTABELA, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLFRETE, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLOUTRASDESP, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0)
                     --+ NVL (PCPEDI.VLOUTROS, 0)
                    ),
                    0
                   )
              ) AS NUMERIC(18,6) ) AS VALORUNITARIOTABELA,

PCPEDI.VLCUSTOFIN AS VALORUNITARIOCUSTO,

CAST(
    DECODE(PCPEDC.CONDVENDA, 5,NVL(PCPEDI.PBONIFIC*PCPEDI.QT,PCPEDI.PTABELA*PCPEDI.QT)
                           , 6,NVL(PCPEDI.PBONIFIC*PCPEDI.QT,PCPEDI.PTABELA*PCPEDI.QT)
                           , 11,NVL(PCPEDI.PBONIFIC*PCPEDI.QT,PCPEDI.PTABELA*PCPEDI.QT)
                           , 1, NVL(PCPEDI.PBONIFIC*PCPEDI.QT, 0)
                           , 12,NVL(PCPEDI.PBONIFIC*PCPEDI.QT,PCPEDI.PTABELA*PCPEDI.QT),0)
    AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS VALORVENDABONIFICACAO,

PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ AS PESOUNITARIOLIQUIDO,
PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO AS PESOUNITARIOBRUTO,
PCPRODUT.VOLUME AS VOLUMEUNITARIO,
DECODE(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0,1)  AS QUANTIDADEUNITARIAMASTER,
PCPEDI.VLFRETE AS VALORFRETE,
PCPEDI.VLOUTRASDESP AS VALORDESPESA
  FROM 
       PCPEDI,
       PCPEDC,
       PCPRODUT 
 WHERE PCPEDI.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED 
   AND PCPEDI.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD
   AND PCPEDC.CONDVENDA NOT IN (4, 8, 10, 13, 20, 98, 99)
   AND PCPEDC.DTCANCEL IS NULL
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDAAUTORIZADA

```sql
SELECT 
PCAUTORI.NRAUTORIZACAO AS NUMEROAUTORIZACAO,
TO_CHAR(PCAUTORI.DATAAUTORIZACAO, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAAUTORIZACAO,
PCAUTORI.CODFUNCUTILIZ AS CODIGOFUNCIONARIORESPONSAVEL,             
PCAUTORI.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,              
PCAUTORI.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
PCPEDC.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
PCAUTORI.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
PCAUTORI.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO, 
PCPEDC.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,   
PCAUTORI.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO, 
PCAUTORI.PVENDAATUAL AS VALORORIGINAL,                                                     
PCAUTORI.PVENDIDO AS VALORVENDIDO,
(SELECT SUM(NVL(QT,0))  FROM PCPEDI                                       
         WHERE PCPEDI.NUMPED  = PCAUTORI.NUMPED                                    
         AND PCPEDI.CODPROD = PCAUTORI.CODPROD) AS QUANTIDADE,
         
         CAST((SELECT SUM(NVL(VLCUSTOFIN,0)) 
         FROM PCPEDI                               
         WHERE PCPEDI.NUMPED  = PCAUTORI.NUMPED                                      
         AND PCPEDI.CODPROD = PCAUTORI.CODPROD) AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS VALORCUSTO             
FROM PCAUTORI, PCUSUARI, PCEMPR, PCCLIENT, PCPRODUT, PCPLPAG, PCPEDC                      
WHERE PCAUTORI.CODUSUR = PCUSUARI.CODUSUR                 
AND PCAUTORI.CODCLI = PCCLIENT.CODCLI
AND PCAUTORI.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD 
AND PCAUTORI.CODPLPAG = PCPLPAG.CODPLPAG 
AND PCAUTORI.CODFUNCCADASTRO = PCEMPR.MATRICULA
AND PCAUTORI.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED
AND PCAUTORI.DATA_UTILIZACAO IS NOT NULL
AND  TO_CHAR(PCAUTORI.DATAAUTORIZACAO , 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -96), 'YYYY')
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDACANCELADA

```sql
SELECT
PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUMEROTRANSACAOVENDA,
PCNFSAID.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
PCMOV.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
PCMOV.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
PCMOV.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
PCMOV.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
PCMOV.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO,
PCNFSAID.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,
TO_CHAR(PCMOV.DTMOV, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFATURAMENTO,
TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATACANCELAMENTO,
TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTENTREGA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAENTREGA,
CAST( ROUND(PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL - PCMOV.DTMOV, 0) AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS DIFERENCADIAS,
PCMOV.QT AS QUANTIDADE,
PCMOV.PUNIT AS VALORUNITARIO
FROM PCNFSAID,
       PCMOV,
       PCCLIENT,
       PCUSUARI,
       PCPRODUT,
       PCFILIAL

 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCMOV.CODCLI = PCCLIENT.CODCLI
   AND PCMOV.CODUSUR = PCUSUARI.CODUSUR
   AND PCMOV.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD
   AND PCMOV.CODFILIAL = PCFILIAL.CODIGO
   AND PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NOT NULL
   AND PCMOV.QT > 0
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDADEVOLUCAO

```sql
SELECT
PCNFENT.NUMNOTA AS NUMERONOTADEVOLUCAO,
PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUMEROTRANSVENDA,
PCNFSAID.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDOVENDA,
PCMOV.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL AS CODIGORCA,
PCMOV.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
PCMOV.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
PCCARREG.NUMCAR AS NUMEROCARREGAMENTO,
PCNFENT.CODDEVOL AS CODIGOMOTIVODEVOLUCAO,
PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO,
PCNFSAID.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,
PCMOV.CODFISCAL AS CODIGOFISCAL,
TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENDA,
TO_CHAR(PCNFENT.DTENT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATADEVOLUCAO,
TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTENTREGA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAENTREGA,
PCMOV.QT  AS QUANTIDADE,
DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,5,0,6,0,11,0,
                                   (DECODE(PCMOV.PUNIT,0,
                                    PCMOV.PUNITCONT,NULL,
                                    PCMOV.PUNITCONT,PCMOV.PUNIT) +
                                    NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0) +
                                    NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0) +
                                    NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0) +
                                    NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0) -
                                    NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0))) AS VALORUNITARIO,
(NVL(PCMOV.QT, 0) *
       (DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                5,
                0,
                6,
                0,
                11,
                0,
                1,
                (CASE
                  WHEN NVL(PCMOVCOMPLE.BONIFIC, 'N') = 'N' THEN
                   (DECODE(PCMOV.PUNIT,
                           0,
                           PCMOV.PUNITCONT,
                           NULL,
                           PCMOV.PUNITCONT,
                           PCMOV.PUNIT) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0) +
                   NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0) +
                   NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0))
                  ELSE
                   0
                END),
                (DECODE(PCMOV.PUNIT,
                        0,
                        PCMOV.PUNITCONT,
                        NULL,
                        PCMOV.PUNITCONT,
                        PCMOV.PUNIT) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0) +
                NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0) +
                NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0))) -
       DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                5,
                0,
                6,
                0,
                11,
                0,
                NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0)) -
       DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 5, 0, 6, 0, 11, 0, NVL(PCMOV.ST, 0)))) +
       ROUND((NVL(PCMOV.QT, 0) *
             DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                     5,
                     0,
                     6,
                     0,
                     11,
                     0,
                     12,
                     0,
                     DECODE(PCMOV.CODOPER, 'SB', 0, NVL(PCMOV.ST, 0)))),
             2) AS VALORTOTAL,
DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,5,0,6,0,11,0, PCMOV.CUSTOFIN) AS CUSTOUNITARIO,
(PCMOV.QT * PCMOV.CUSTOFIN) AS VALORCUSTOTOTAL,
DECODE(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0,1) AS QUANTIDADEUNITARIAMASTER,
(PCMOV.QT*PCMOV.VLCREDPIS) AS VALORPIS,
(PCMOV.QT*PCMOV.VLCREDCOFINS) AS VALORCOFINS,
PCMOV.VLIPI AS VALORIPI,
PCMOV.ST AS VALORST,
PCMOVCOMPLE.VLICMS AS VALORICMS,
PCMOV.PESOLIQ AS PESOUNITARIOLIQUIDO,
PCMOV.PESOBRUTO AS PESOUNITARIOBRUTO,
(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO * PCMOV.QT) AS PESOBRUTOTOTAL,
PCMOV.VOLUME AS VOLUMEUNITARIO,
(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,5,
                                     PCMOV.PUNITCONT + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO,0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0),6,
                                     PCMOV.PUNITCONT + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO,0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0),11,
                                     PCMOV.PUNITCONT + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO,0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0),
                                     0)) VALORUNITARIOBONIFICADO,


(NVL(PCMOV.QT,0)* DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,5,1,6,1,11,1,12,1,0)) QUANTIDADEBONIFICADA,
PCESTCOM.VLDEVOLUCAO,
PCNFSAID.VLTOTAL,
PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA AS PCESTCOMNUMTRANSVENDA,
PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA AS PCNFSAIDNUMTRANSVENDA,
NUMDIAS AS NUMDIAS
FROM PCNFENT, PCESTCOM, PCNFSAID, PCCARREG, PCMOV, PCPRODUT, PCCLIENT, PCMOVCOMPLE, PCPLPAG,PCPREST
 WHERE PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT = PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT = PCMOV.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA(+)
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR(+)
   AND PCMOV.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD
   AND PCNFENT.CODFORNEC = PCCLIENT.CODCLI
   AND  PCMOV.NUMTRANSITEM = PCMOVCOMPLE.NUMTRANSITEM(+)
   AND PCMOV.DTCANCEL IS NULL
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER = 'ED'
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA <> 0
  AND NVL(PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA, 0) <> 0
  AND  PCPLPAG.CODPLPAG = PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG
  AND  PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT = PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDADEVOLUCAOAVULSA

```sql
SELECT DISTINCT
               PCNFENT.NUMNOTA AS NUMERONOTADEVOLUCAO,
               PCMOV.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
               PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL AS CODIGORCA,
               PCMOV.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
               PCMOV.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
               PCNFENT.CODDEVOL AS CODIGOMOTIVODEVOLUCAO,
               PCMOV.CODFISCAL AS CODIGOFISCAL,
               null AS DATAVENDA,
               TO_CHAR(PCNFENT.DTENT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATADEVOLUCAO,
               null AS DATAENTREGA,
               PCMOV.QT AS QUANTIDADE,
               (NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0) +
                                                   NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0) +
                                                   NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0) +
                                                   NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0) -
                                                   NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0)) AS VALORUNITARIO,
               PCMOV.CUSTOFIN AS CUSTOUNITARIO,
(PCMOV.QT * PCMOV.CUSTOFIN) AS VALORCUSTOTOTAL,
               PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX AS QUANTIDADEUNITARIAMASTER,
               (PCMOV.QT*PCMOV.VLCREDPIS) AS VALORPIS,
               (PCMOV.QT*PCMOV.VLCREDCOFINS) AS VALORCOFINS,
               PCMOV.VLIPI AS VALORIPI,
               PCMOV.ST AS VALORST,
PCMOVCOMPLE.VLICMS AS VALORICMS,
PCMOV.PESOLIQ AS PESOUNITARIOLIQUIDO,
PCMOV.PESOBRUTO AS PESOUNITARIOBRUTO,
PCMOV.VOLUME AS VOLUMEUNITARIO,
GD.CODPLPAG, 
GD.NUMDIAS
FROM PCNFENT,
         PCESTCOM,
        --PCNFSAID,
        --PCDOCREFERENCIADO,
         PCMOV,
         PCPRODUT,
PCMOVCOMPLE,
GD_FATO_FIN_DEVOLUCAOAVULSA GD
   WHERE 
       PCNFENT.TIPODESCARGA NOT IN ('C', 'D', '8')
     AND NVL(PCNFENT.OBS, 'X') <> 'NF CANCELADA'
     AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT = PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT
     AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT = PCMOV.NUMTRANSENT
   --AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT = PCDOCREFERENCIADO.NUMTRANSACAO(+)
   --AND PCDOCREFERENCIADO.CHAVENFEREF = PCNFSAID.CHAVENFE(+)
     AND PCMOV.NUMTRANSITEM = PCMOVCOMPLE.NUMTRANSITEM(+)
     AND NVL(PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA, 0) = 0
     AND PCMOV.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD
     AND(PCNFENT.NUMNOTA = GD.NUMNOTA AND PCMOV.CODPROD  = GD.CODPROD AND PCMOV.CODFILIAL = GD.CODFILIAL AND TO_CHAR(PCNFENT.DTENT, 'YYYYMMDD') = GD.DATADEVOLUCAO)
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDAFATURAMENTO

```sql
SELECT
PCMOV.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO,
PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUMEROTRANSVENDA,
PCMOV.CODPROD AS CODIGOPRODUTO,
PCMOV.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
PCMOV.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
PCMOV.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
NVL(PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR, PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR) AS CODIGOAUXILIAR,
PCNFSAID.CODCOB AS CODIGOCOBRANCA,
PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG AS CODIGOPLANOPAGAMENTO,
PCNFSAID.NUMCAR AS NUMEROCARREGAMENTO,
TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAFATURAMENTO,
TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTENTREGA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAENTREGA,
CAST(DECODE(PCMOV.CODOPER,
       'S',
       (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,7,PCMOV.QTCONT, PCMOV.QT),0)),
       'ST',
       (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,7,PCMOV.QTCONT,PCMOV.QT), 0)),
       'SM',
       (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,7,PCMOV.QTCONT,PCMOV.QT),0)),
       0)AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS QUANTIDADE,

CAST((NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,7,PCMOV.PUNITCONT,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT, 0) +
                                                        NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0) +
                                                        NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0) +
                                                        NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0) +
                                                        NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0) -
                                                        NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0)  ),
                                                        0))AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS VALORUNITARIO,

/* INICIO CALC VALORTOTAL */

ROUND(
    NVL(
        NVL((CASE
            WHEN ROUND(PCMOVCOMPLE.VLSUBTOTITEM, 2) IS NOT NULL THEN
                ROUND(PCMOVCOMPLE.VLSUBTOTITEM, 2)
            ELSE
                NULL
            END)
        , (ROUND(
                (DECODE(PCMOV.CODOPER,
                     'S', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                     'ST', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                     'SM', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                0))
                * (
                    (NVL(
                        DECODE(
                            PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
                            , 7
                            , DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT, 0), PCMOV.PUNITCONT)
                                + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0)
                                + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0)
                                + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0)
                                + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0)
                            , NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT, 0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0))
                     , 0))
                     - NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI, 0)
                     - NVL(PCMOV.ST, 0)
                   )
            , 2))
            + ROUND(
              NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI, 0)
              * (DECODE(PCMOV.CODOPER,
                        'S', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                        'ST', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                        'SM', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                        0))
            , 2)
           + ROUND(
              NVL(PCMOV.ST, 0)
              * (DECODE(PCMOV.CODOPER,
                        'S', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                        'ST', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                        'SM', (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0)),
                        0))
            , 2)
        )
    , 0)
, 2) AS VALORTOTAL,

/* FIM CALC VALORTOTAL */

DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                  5, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC, 0), 0, PCMOV.PTABELA + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0), PCMOV.PBONIFIC + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0)),
                  6, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC, 0), 0, PCMOV.PTABELA + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0), PCMOV.PBONIFIC + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0)),
                  11, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC, 0), 0, PCMOV.PTABELA + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0), PCMOV.PBONIFIC + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0)),
                  12, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC, 0), 0, PCMOV.PTABELA + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0), PCMOV.PBONIFIC + NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0)),
                  1, CASE WHEN PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC, 0) ELSE 0 END,
                  0) VALORUNITARIOBONIFICADO,
NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT, 0) QUANTIDADEBONIFICADA,
PCMOV.PTABELA AS VALORUNITARIOTABELA,
PCMOV.CUSTOFIN AS VALORUNITARIOCUSTO,

--(PCMOV.QT * PCMOV.CUSTOFIN) AS VALORCUSTOTOTAL,

NVL(
    ROUND(
        (DECODE(
            PCMOV.CODOPER
            , 'S'
            , (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0))
            , 'ST'
            , (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0))
            , 'SM'
            , (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0))
            , 'SB'
            , (NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 1, CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOVCOMPLE.BONIFIC, 'N') = 'F' THEN PCMOV.QT ELSE 0 END, 7, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'), 'C', PCMOV.QT, PCMOV.QTCONT), PCMOV.QT), 0))
            , 0))
        * (NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN, 0))
    , 2)
, 0) AS VALORCUSTOTOTAL,

ROUND(
        NVL(
            (NVL(PCMOV.QT, 0)
                * DECODE(
                PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
                , 5
                , 0
                , 6
                , 0
                ,   NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA, 0)
                    + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE, 0)
                    + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP, 0)
                    + NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO, 0)
                    + NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS, 0)
                    - DECODE(NVL(PCMOVCOMPLE.BONIFIC, 'N'), 'F', NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC, 0), 0)
                    - NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0)))
        , 0)
, 2) AS VALORTABELA,
PCMOV.PESOLIQ AS PESOUNITARIOLIQUIDO,
PCMOV.PESOBRUTO AS PESOUNITARIOBRUTO,
(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO * PCMOV.QT) AS PESOBRUTOTOTAL,
PCMOV.VOLUME AS VOLUMEUNITARIO,
PCMOV.ST AS VALORST,
PCMOV.VLPIS AS VALORPIS,
PCMOV.VLCOFINS AS VALORCOFINS,
PCMOV.VLIPI AS VALORIPI,
DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 0, 0, PCMOV.PERCOM*0.01) AS PERCENTUALCOMISSAO,
PCMOV.BASEICMS,
DECODE(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0,1,NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,1)) AS QUANTIDADECAIXA,
NVL(PCMOV.VLVERBACMVCLI,0) + NVL(PCMOV.VLVERBACMV,0) AS VALORVERBAUNITARIO,
PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO AS VALORFRETE,
PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP AS VALOROUTRASDESPESAS,
PCMOVCOMPLE.VLICMS AS VALORICMS,
PCMOVCOMPLE.VLACRESCIMOFUNCEP AS FECPNORMAL,
PCMOVCOMPLE.VLFECP AS FECPST,
PCMOV.QT, 
PCMOV.VLDESCFIN,
PCMOV.PERCDESCFIN,
PCMOV.VLDESCONTO,
PCPLPAG.NUMDIAS AS NUMDIAS
 FROM 
 
       PCNFSAID,
       PCMOV,
       PCPRODUT,
       PCMOVCOMPLE,
       PCPLPAG
WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG = PCPLPAG.CODPLPAG
   AND PCMOV.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD
   AND PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NULL
   AND NVL(PCNFSAID.TIPOVENDA, 'X') NOT IN ('SR', 'DF')
   AND NVL(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 0) NOT IN (4, 8, 10, 13, 20, 98, 99,0)
   AND NVL(PCNFSAID.CODFISCAL, 0) NOT IN (522, 622, 722, 532, 632, 732)
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA = PCMOV.NUMNOTA
   AND PCMOV.NUMTRANSITEM = PCMOVCOMPLE.NUMTRANSITEM(+)
   AND NVL(PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C') IN ('C', 'N')
```


#### GD_FATO_VENDAS_DEPARTAMENTO

```sql
SELECT R.VALOR AS VALOR, TO_CHAR (l.dtcompetencia, 'yyyyMMdd') AS DT, l.codfilial AS FILIAL, c.codigocentrocusto AS CENTROCUSTO, '10.2.1' AS CODAGRUPAMENTO, p.conta  AS DESCAGRUPAMENTO

FROM PCLANC L,                                                                       
          PCCENTROCUSTO C,                                                                
          PCRATEIOCENTROCUSTO R,                                                          
          PCCONTA P                                             
             WHERE L.CODCONTA = R.CODCONTA                                                
              AND L.CODCONTA = P.CODCONTA                                                
              AND L.RECNUM = R.RECNUM                                                    
              AND R.CODIGOCENTROCUSTO = C.CODIGOCENTROCUSTO                                                      
              AND NVL(L.CODROTINABAIXA,0) <> 737 --Para não buscar os lançamentos que foram desdobrados pela 737
              AND l.dtestornobaixa is null --Para nao buscar os titulos de origem de estorno de baixa da rotina 775                                                               AND (NVL(P.INVESTIMENTO,'N') <> 'S') --Para não buscar os lançamentos que estão em conta de investimento 
              AND R.CODIGOCENTROCUSTO LIKE '03.02%'
```


#### GD_FATO_VERBA

```sql
SELECT 
 PCMOVCRFOR.NUMTRANSCRFOR AS NUMEROTRANSACAO,
 TO_CHAR(PCMOVCRFOR.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAMOVIMENTACAO,      
 PCMOVCRFOR.CODFORNEC AS CODIGOFORNECEDOR,
 PCMOVCRFOR.NUMVERBA AS NUMEROVERBA,
 PCMOVCRFOR.CODFILIAL AS CODIGOFILIAL,
 TO_CHAR(PCMOVCRFOR.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATAVENCIMENTO,       
 CAST ( DECODE(PCMOVCRFOR.TIPO, 'D', PCMOVCRFOR.VALOR, 0) AS NUMERIC(18,6) ) AS VALORDEBITO,       
 CAST ( DECODE(PCMOVCRFOR.TIPO, 'C', PCMOVCRFOR.VALOR *(-1), 0) AS NUMERIC(18,6) ) AS VALORCREDITO
 FROM PCMOVCRFOR,                                                        
      PCVERBA                                         
 WHERE PCMOVCRFOR.NUMVERBA = PCVERBA.NUMVERBA(+)
```


#### GD_FATO_VISITA

```sql
SELECT 
VIS.CODVISITA AS CODIGOVISITA,
VIS.CODCLI AS CODIGOCLIENTE,
VIS.CODUSUR AS CODIGORCA,
TO_CHAR(VIS.DATA, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA,
NFS.NUMPED AS NUMEROPEDIDO
FROM PCVISITA VIS
LEFT JOIN PCNFSAID NFS ON ( NFS.CODCLI = VIS.CODCLI AND NFS.CODUSUR = VIS.CODUSUR AND TRUNC(NFS.DTSAIDA) = TRUNC(VIS.DATA))
WHERE TO_CHAR(VIS.DATA , 'YYYY') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -96), 'YYYY')
```


#### PC_VW_PCCLIENTECADRCA

```sql
SELECT CODUSUR, CODSUPERVISOR, DTCADASTRO, COUNT(*) AS QTCLICAD
    FROM (SELECT 0 CODSUPERVISOR,
                 PCUSUARI.CODUSUR,
                 PCCLIENT.DTCADASTRO,
                 PCCLIENT.CODCLI
            FROM PCCLIENT, PCUSUARI
           WHERE PCCLIENT.DTEXCLUSAO IS NULL
             AND (PCUSUARI.CODUSUR = PCCLIENT.CODUSUR1 OR
                 PCUSUARI.CODUSUR = PCCLIENT.CODUSUR2)
          UNION          
          SELECT 0 CODSUPERVISOR,
                 PCUSURCLI.CODUSUR,
                 PCCLIENT.DTCADASTRO,
                 PCCLIENT.CODCLI                 
            FROM PCCLIENT, PCUSURCLI
           WHERE PCCLIENT.DTEXCLUSAO IS NULL
             AND PCUSURCLI.codcli = pcclient.codcli
          UNION
          SELECT PCUSUARI.CODSUPERVISOR,
                 0 CODUSUR,
                 PCCLIENT.DTCADASTRO,
                 PCCLIENT.CODCLI                 
            FROM PCCLIENT, PCUSUARI
           WHERE PCCLIENT.DTEXCLUSAO IS NULL
             AND (PCUSUARI.CODUSUR = PCCLIENT.CODUSUR1 OR
                 PCUSUARI.CODUSUR = PCCLIENT.CODUSUR2)
          UNION
          SELECT PCUSUARI.CODSUPERVISOR,
                 0 CODUSUR,
                 PCCLIENT.DTCADASTRO,
                 PCCLIENT.CODCLI                 
            FROM PCCLIENT, PCUSURCLI, PCUSUARI
           WHERE PCCLIENT.DTEXCLUSAO IS NULL
             AND PCUSURCLI.CODCLI = PCCLIENT.CODCLI
             AND PCUSUARI.CODUSUR = PCUSURCLI.CODUSUR)
   GROUP BY CODSUPERVISOR, CODUSUR, DTCADASTRO
   ORDER BY CODSUPERVISOR, CODUSUR
```

#### SQL_INTEGRACAO_EST_ANTERIOR

```sql
SELECT CODPROD
      ,DESCRICAO
      ,CODFAB
      ,QTUNIT
      ,QTUNITCX
      ,CODAUXILIAR
      ,CODAUXILIAR2
      ,CODFORNEC
      ,PESOBRUTO
      ,PESOLIQ
      ,VOLUME
      ,CODFILIAL
      ,SUM(QTESTGER) AS QTESTGER
      ,SUM(QTRESERV) AS QTRESERV
      ,SUM(QTBLOQUEADA) AS QTBLOQUEADA
      ,SUM((QTESTGER-QTESTGER-QTBLOQUEADA)) AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,SUM(QTEST) AS QTEST
      ,DATA AS DATA
  FROM (
SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,ESTOQUE.CODFILIAL
      ,ESTOQUE.QTESTGER
      ,ESTOQUE.QTRESERV
      ,ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA) AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,ESTOQUE.QTEST
      ,ESTOQUE.DATA AS DATA
      ,'N' AS ITEMDACESTA
  FROM PCHISTEST ESTOQUE
      ,PCPRODUT
 WHERE (PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC NOT IN('CB') OR PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC IS NULL)
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD = ESTOQUE.CODPROD
UNION
SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,ESTOQUE.CODFILIAL
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTESTGER * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTESTGER
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTRESERV * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTRESERV
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTBLOQUEADA
      ,((ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA) * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTEST * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTEST
      ,ESTOQUE.DATA AS DATA
      ,'S' AS ITEMDACESTA
  FROM PCHISTEST ESTOQUE
      ,PCPRODUT CESTA
      ,PCFORMPROD
      ,PCPRODUT
 WHERE ESTOQUE.CODPROD        = CESTA.CODPROD
   AND PCFORMPROD.CODPRODACAB = CESTA.CODPROD
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD      = PCFORMPROD.CODPRODMP
   AND CESTA.TIPOMERC      = 'CB'
)
GROUP BY CODPROD
      ,DESCRICAO
      ,CODFAB
      ,QTUNIT
      ,QTUNITCX
      ,CODAUXILIAR
      ,CODAUXILIAR2
      ,CODFORNEC
      ,PESOBRUTO
      ,PESOLIQ
      ,VOLUME
      ,CODFILIAL
      ,DATA
UNION
SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIAL
      ,0 AS QTESTGER
      ,0 AS QTRESERV
      ,0 AS QTBLOQUEADA
      ,0 AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,0 AS QTEST
      ,PCMOV.DTMOV AS DATA
  FROM PCPRODUT
      ,PCMOV
 WHERE PCPRODUT.CODPROD = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER IN ('S','SB','SM','ST','SR','ED')
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT >0)
   AND (PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC <> 'CB' OR PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC IS NULL)
   AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT H.CODPROD
                    FROM PCHISTEST H
                   WHERE 1=1
                     AND H.CODFILIAL = PCMOV.CODFILIAL
                     AND H.CODPROD = PCMOV.CODPROD
                     AND H.DATA = PCMOV.DTMOV)
```


#### SQL_INTEGRACAO_EST_ATUAL

```sql
SELECT CODPROD
      ,DESCRICAO
      ,CODFAB
      ,QTUNIT
      ,QTUNITCX
      ,CODAUXILIAR
      ,CODAUXILIAR2
      ,CODFORNEC
      ,PESOBRUTO
      ,PESOLIQ
      ,VOLUME
      ,CODFILIAL
      ,SUM(QTESTGER) AS QTESTGER
      ,SUM(QTRESERV) AS QTRESERV
      ,SUM(QTBLOQUEADA) AS QTBLOQUEADA
      ,SUM((QTESTGER-QTESTGER-QTBLOQUEADA)) AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,SUM(QTEST) AS QTEST
      ,DATA AS DATA
  FROM (
SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,ESTOQUE.CODFILIAL
      ,ESTOQUE.QTESTGER
      ,ESTOQUE.QTRESERV
      ,ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA) AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,ESTOQUE.QTEST
      ,TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS DATA
      ,'N' AS ITEMDACESTA
  FROM PCEST ESTOQUE
      ,PCPRODUT
 WHERE (PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC NOT IN('CB') OR PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC IS NULL)
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD = ESTOQUE.CODPROD
UNION
SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,ESTOQUE.CODFILIAL
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTESTGER * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTESTGER
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTRESERV * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTRESERV
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTBLOQUEADA
      ,((ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTESTGER-ESTOQUE.QTBLOQUEADA) * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTDISPONIVEL
      ,(ESTOQUE.QTEST * PCFORMPROD.QTPRODMP) AS QTEST
      ,TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS DATA
      ,'S' AS ITEMDACESTA
  FROM PCEST ESTOQUE
      ,PCPRODUT CESTA
      ,PCFORMPROD
      ,PCPRODUT
 WHERE ESTOQUE.CODPROD        = CESTA.CODPROD
   AND PCFORMPROD.CODPRODACAB = CESTA.CODPROD
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD      = PCFORMPROD.CODPRODMP
   AND CESTA.TIPOMERC      = 'CB'
)
GROUP BY CODPROD
      ,DESCRICAO
      ,CODFAB
      ,QTUNIT
      ,QTUNITCX
      ,CODAUXILIAR
      ,CODAUXILIAR2
      ,CODFORNEC
      ,PESOBRUTO
      ,PESOLIQ
      ,VOLUME
      ,CODFILIAL
      ,DATA
```


#### SQL_INTEGRACAO_NF_DEVOLUCOES

```sql
SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) AS QT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) AS QTCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) AS PBONIFIC
      ,PCMOV.STATUS
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,(CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END) AS QTDEVOLUCAO
      ,PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT
      ,PCNFENT.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFENT.CODFILIAL
      ,PCNFENT.CODFORNEC AS CODCLI
      ,PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL AS CODUSUR
      ,NVL(PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA,0) AS NUMTRANSVENDA
      ,PCNFENT.DTENT
      ,NVL(PCNFCAN.DATACANC, PCMOV.DTCANCEL) AS DTCANCEL
      ,PCNFENT.TIPODESCARGA
      ,PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
      ,(DECODE(PCESTCOM.VLDEVOLUCAO, 0, 0, DECODE(NVL(PCMOV.QT,0),0,PCMOV.QTCONT,PCMOV.QT)) * NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA, 7, PCMOV.PUNITCONT, PCMOV.PUNIT), 0)) AS VLDEVOLUCAO
      ,PCNFENT.CODFISCAL
      ,PCNFENT.OBS
      ,PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA
  FROM PCNFENT
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCESTCOM
      ,PCNFCAN
      ,PCNFSAID
 WHERE PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT  = PCMOV.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCNFENT.CODCONT IN(SELECT PCCONSUM.CODCONTCLI FROM PCCONSUM UNION SELECT PCCONSUM.CODCONTDEVCLI FROM PCCONSUM)
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD     = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT = PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA(+)
   AND PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT  = PCNFCAN.NUMTRANSVENDA(+)
   AND PCNFENT.CODFILIAL    = PCNFCAN.CODFILIAL(+)
   AND (PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC NOT IN('CB') OR PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC IS NULL)
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCNFENT.TIPODESCARGA IN('6','7')
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER = 'ED'
   AND (PCNFENT.DTENT <> TRUNC(NVL(PCNFCAN.DATACANC,PCMOV.DTCANCEL)) OR NVL(PCNFENT.OBS,'XX') <> 'NF CANCELADA')
```


#### SQL_INTEGRACAO_NF_VENDAS

```sql
SELECT /*+ INDEX(PCMOV PCMOV_IDX21)*/ PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA 
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNIT
      ,PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO,0) AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ,0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.VOLUME,0) AS VOLUME
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) AS QT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) AS QTCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) AS PBONIFIC
      ,PCMOV.STATUS
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,(CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END) AS QTMOV
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMPED
      ,PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL
      ,PCNFSAID.CODCLI
      ,PCNFSAID.CODUSUR
      ,PCNFSAID.CODSUPERVISOR
      ,PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA
      ,PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG
      ,PCNFSAID.CODCOB
      ,PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
      ,TRUNC(NVL(PCNFCAN.DATACANC,PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL)) AS DTCANCEL
      ,(CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END) AS QTVENDA
      ,(CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA IN (5,6,11,12) OR PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 
        CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END) AS QTVENDIDA
      ,(CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA IN (5,6,11,12) OR PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 
        CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END * 
        CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) END) AS VLVENDA
      ,(CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA IN (5,6,11,12) OR PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END * 
        CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END * 
        CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) END) AS VLBONIFIC
      ,PCNFSAID.CODFISCAL
  FROM PCNFSAID
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCNFCAN
 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD       = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFCAN.NUMTRANSVENDA(+)
   AND PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL     = PCNFCAN.CODFILIAL(+)
   AND (PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC NOT IN('CB') OR PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC IS NULL)
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA NOT IN(4,8,13,98,99)
   AND (PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA <> TRUNC(NVL(PCNFCAN.DATACANC,PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL)) OR PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NULL)
```


#### SQL_NFE_PARCELA_SAIDA_CARTAO

```sql
SELECT PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       (TO_CHAR(PCPREST.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(PCPREST.PREST)) AS PRESTACAO,
       PCPREST.DUPLIC,
       PCPREST.PREST,
       DECODE(PCPREST.CODCOB,
              'VPP',
              PCPREST.DTEMISSAO,
              PCPREST.DTVENC) AS DTVENC,
       NVL(PCPREST.VALORENTFUT, PCPREST.VALOR) AS VALOR,
       PCPREST.CODCOB,
       NVL(PCPREST.VALORDESC, 0) AS VALORDESC,
       PCPREST.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       PCPREST.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPREST.BANDEIRACARTAO, NVL(TO_NUMBER(PCCOB.CODBANDEIRAOPERADORACARTAO), 99)) AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPREST.CORRESPONDENTE, '2') AS TP_INTEGRA,
       PCPREST.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'N' PREFATURAMENTO, 
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(PCPREST.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(PCPREST.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       PCPREST.CNPJRECEB,
       PCPREST.IDTERMPAG
FROM   PCPREST, PCNFSAID, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE  PCPREST.STATUS = 'A'
AND    PCPREST.DTDESD IS NULL
AND    PCPREST.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND    PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND    PCPREST.CODCLI = PCNFSAID.CODCLI
AND    PCCOB.CODCOB = PCPREST.CODCOB
AND    PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND    ((NVL(PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND    NVL(PCPREST.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND    NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'S'
AND    NVL(PCPREST.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND    PCPREST.CODCOB <> 'DESD'

UNION ALL

SELECT PCPRESTPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       (TO_CHAR(PCPRESTPREFAT.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(PCPRESTPREFAT.PREST)) AS PRESTACAO,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.DUPLIC,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.PREST,
       DECODE(PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB,
              'VPP',
              PCPRESTPREFAT.DTEMISSAO,
              PCPRESTPREFAT.DTVENC) AS DTVENC,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.VALORENTFUT, PCPRESTPREFAT.VALOR) AS VALOR,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.VALORDESC, 0) AS VALORDESC,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.BANDEIRACARTAO, NVL(TO_NUMBER(PCCOB.CODBANDEIRAOPERADORACARTAO), 99)) AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.CORRESPONDENTE, '2') AS TP_INTEGRA,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'S' PREFATURAMENTO,
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CNPJRECEB,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.IDTERMPAG
FROM   PCPRESTPREFAT, PCNFSAIDPREFAT, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE  PCPRESTPREFAT.STATUS = 'A'
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.DTDESD IS NULL
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCLI = PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODCLI
AND    PCCOB.CODCOB = PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB
AND    PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND    ((NVL(PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND    NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND    NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'S'
AND    NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB <> 'DESD'
```


#### SQL_NFE_PARCELA_SAIDA_DESD

```sql
SELECT DISTINCT PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
                (TO_CHAR(PCPREST.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(PCPREST.PREST)) AS PRESTACAO,
                DECODE(NVL(PCPREST.CODCOBORIG,
                           PCPREST.CODCOB),
                       'VPP',
                       PCPREST.DTEMISSAO,
                       PCPREST.DTVENCORIG) AS DTVENC,
                NVL(PCPREST.VALORENTFUT, NVL(PCPREST.VALOR,0)) - nvl((SELECT SUM(ABS(NVL(PCPREST.VALORENTFUT, NVL(P.VALOR,0)))) FROM PCPREST P WHERE P.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA AND (CODCOB = 'TR' OR CODCOBORIG = 'TR') GROUP BY VALOR),0) AS VALOR,
                NVL(PCPREST.CODCOBORIG,
                    PCPREST.CODCOB) AS CODCOB,
                NVL(PCPREST.VALORDESC,
                    0) AS VALORDESC,
                    PCDESD.PRESTORIG AS PREST,
       PCPREST.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       PCPREST.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.BANDEIRACARTAO AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(PCPREST.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(PCPREST.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       PCPREST.CNPJRECEB,
       PCPREST.IDTERMPAG                    
FROM   PCPREST,
       PCDESD,
       PCNFSAID, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE  PCPREST.CODCOB = 'DESD'
AND    PCPREST.CODCOB = PCCOB.CODCOB
AND    PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND    PCDESD.NUMTRANSVENDAORIG = PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND    PCDESD.PRESTORIG = PCPREST.PREST
AND    PCPREST.CODCOBORIG NOT IN ('JUR')
AND    PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND    ((NVL(PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND    NVL(PCPREST.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND    (PCPREST.CODCOB <> 'TR' AND PCPREST.CODCOBORIG <> 'TR')
```


#### SQL_NFE_PARCELA_SAIDA_DIN

```sql
SELECT DH.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       MAX((TO_CHAR(DH.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(DH.PREST))) AS PRESTACAO,
       MAX(DH.DUPLIC) AS DUPLIC,
       MAX(DH.PREST) AS PREST,
       MAX(DECODE(DH.CODCOB,
                  'VPP',
                  DH.DTEMISSAO,
                  DH.DTVENC)) AS DTVENC,
       MAX(NVL(DH.VALORENTFUT, DH.VALOR)) AS VALOR,
       MAX(DH.CODCOB) AS CODCOB,
       MAX(NVL(DH.VALORDESC, 0)) AS VALORDESC,
       MAX(DH.CODCOBSEFAZ) AS CODCOBSEFAZ,
       MAX(DH.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO) AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       MAX(DH.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO) AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       MAX(DH.NSUTEF) AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       MAX(DH.BANDEIRACARTAO) AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       MAX(NVL(DH.CORRESPONDENTE, '2')) AS TP_INTEGRA,
       MAX(DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT) DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'N' PREFATURAMENTO,
       MAX(PCCOB.INDPAG) INDPAG,
	     MAX(NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]'))) CNPJPAG,
       MAX(NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT)) UFPAG,
       MAX(DH.CNPJRECEB) CNPJRECEB,
       MAX(DH.IDTERMPAG) IDTERMPAG
FROM  PCPREST DH, PCNFSAID, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE DH.STATUS = 'A'
AND   DH.DTDESD IS NULL
AND   DH.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND   NVL(DH.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND   DH.CODCOB IN ('DH', 'D')
AND   PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = DH.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND   DH.CODCLI = PCNFSAID.CODCLI
AND   PCCOB.CODCOB = DH.CODCOB
AND   PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND   ((NVL(PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(DH.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
GROUP BY DH.NUMTRANSVENDA, DH.PREST
--Modifiquei pois no cliente tinha plano especial de pgto e deveria trazer as 03 parcelas Bruno 4255.040287.2016
UNION ALL
SELECT DH.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       MAX((TO_CHAR(DH.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(DH.PREST))) AS PRESTACAO,
       MAX(DH.DUPLIC) AS DUPLIC,
       MAX(DH.PREST) AS PREST,
       MAX(DECODE(DH.CODCOB,
                  'VPP',
                  DH.DTEMISSAO,
                  DH.DTVENC)) AS DTVENC,
       MAX(NVL(DH.VALORENTFUT, DH.VALOR)) AS VALOR,
       MAX(DH.CODCOB) AS CODCOB,
       MAX(NVL(DH.VALORDESC, 0)) AS VALORDESC,
       MAX(DH.CODCOBSEFAZ) AS CODCOBSEFAZ,
       MAX(DH.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO) AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       MAX(DH.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO) AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       MAX(DH.NSUTEF) AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       MAX(DH.BANDEIRACARTAO) AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       MAX(NVL(DH.CORRESPONDENTE, '2')) AS TP_INTEGRA,
       MAX(DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT) DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'S' PREFATURAMENTO,
       MAX(PCCOB.INDPAG) INDPAG,
	     MAX(NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]'))) CNPJPAG,
       MAX(NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT)) UFPAG,
       MAX(DH.CNPJRECEB) CNPJRECEB,
       MAX(DH.IDTERMPAG) IDTERMPAG
FROM  PCPRESTPREFAT DH, PCNFSAIDPREFAT, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE DH.STATUS = 'A'
AND   DH.DTDESD IS NULL
AND   DH.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND   NVL(DH.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND   DH.CODCOB IN ('DH', 'D')
AND   PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA = DH.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND   DH.CODCLI = PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODCLI
AND   PCCOB.CODCOB = DH.CODCOB
AND   PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND   ((NVL(PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(DH.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND   DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT IS NULL
GROUP BY DH.NUMTRANSVENDA, DH.PREST
```


#### SQL_NFE_PARCELA_SAIDA_NORMAL

```sql
SELECT PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       (TO_CHAR(PCPREST.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(PCPREST.PREST)) AS PRESTACAO,
       PCPREST.DUPLIC,
       PCPREST.PREST,
       DECODE(PCPREST.CODCOB,
              'VPP',
              PCPREST.DTEMISSAO,
              PCPREST.DTVENC) AS DTVENC,
       NVL(PCPREST.VALORENTFUT, PCPREST.VALOR) AS VALOR,
       PCPREST.CODCOB,
       NVL(PCPREST.VALORDESC, 0) AS VALORDESC,
       PCPREST.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       PCPREST.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPREST.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPREST.BANDEIRACARTAO, NVL(TO_NUMBER(PCCOB.CODBANDEIRAOPERADORACARTAO), 99)) AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPREST.CORRESPONDENTE, '2') AS TP_INTEGRA,
       PCPREST.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'N' PREFATURAMENTO,
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(PCPREST.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(PCPREST.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       PCPREST.CNPJRECEB,
       PCPREST.IDTERMPAG
FROM   PCPREST, PCNFSAID, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE  PCPREST.STATUS = 'A'
AND    PCPREST.DTDESD IS NULL
AND    PCPREST.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND    PCPREST.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND    PCPREST.CODCLI = PCNFSAID.CODCLI
AND    PCCOB.CODCOB = PCPREST.CODCOB
AND    PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND    ((NVL(PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND    NVL(PCPREST.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND    PCPREST.CODCOB NOT IN ('DESC', 'DESD', 'DEVP', 'DEVT', 'BNFM', 
                              'BNFI', 'BNTR', 'BNFN', 'BNFC', 'DH', 'D', 'TR')
     --códigos removidos por conta da nfe 4.00: 'BNF', 'BNFT', 'BNFR', 'BNTR','BNRP', 'CRED',
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(PCPREST.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
UNION ALL
SELECT PCPRESTPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       (TO_CHAR(PCPRESTPREFAT.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(PCPRESTPREFAT.PREST)) AS PRESTACAO,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.DUPLIC,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.PREST,
       DECODE(PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB,
              'VPP',
              PCPRESTPREFAT.DTEMISSAO,
              PCPRESTPREFAT.DTVENC) AS DTVENC,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.VALORENTFUT, PCPRESTPREFAT.VALOR) AS VALOR,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.VALORDESC, 0) AS VALORDESC,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.BANDEIRACARTAO, NVL(TO_NUMBER(PCCOB.CODBANDEIRAOPERADORACARTAO), 99)) AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.CORRESPONDENTE, '2') AS TP_INTEGRA,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'S' PREFATURAMENTO,
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.CNPJRECEB,
       PCPRESTPREFAT.IDTERMPAG
FROM   PCPRESTPREFAT, PCNFSAIDPREFAT, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE  PCPRESTPREFAT.STATUS = 'A'
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.DTDESD IS NULL
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCLI = PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODCLI
AND    PCCOB.CODCOB = PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB
AND    PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB NOT IN ('DESC', 'DESD', 'DEVP', 'DEVT', 'BNFM')
AND    ((NVL(PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND    NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND    PCPRESTPREFAT.CODCOB NOT IN ('DESC', 'DESD', 'DEVP', 'DEVT', 'BNFM', 
                                    'BNFI', 'BNTR', 'BNFN', 'BNFC', 'DH', 'D', 'TR')
     --códigos removidos por conta da nfe 4.00: 'BNF', 'BNFT', 'BNFR', 'BNTR','BNRP', 'CRED',
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(PCPRESTPREFAT.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND   PCPRESTPREFAT.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT IS NULL
```


#### SQL_NFE_PARCELA_SAIDA_ST

```sql
SELECT DH.Numtransvendast AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       DH.DUPLIC ||' - '||DH.PREST AS PRESTACAO,
       DH.DUPLIC,
       DH.PREST,
       DH.DTVENC AS DTVENC,
       SUM(NVL(DH.VALORENTFUT, DH.VALOR)) AS VALOR,
       DH.CODCOB AS CODCOB,
       0 AS VALORDESC,
       DH.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       DH.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       DH.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       DH.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       DH.BANDEIRACARTAO AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NVL(DH.CORRESPONDENTE, '2') AS TP_INTEGRA,
       MAX(DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT) DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'N' PREFATURAMENTO,
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       DH.CNPJRECEB,
       DH.IDTERMPAG
FROM  PCPREST DH, PCNFSAID, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE DH.STATUS = 'A'
AND   DH.DTDESD IS NULL
AND   DH.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND   PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = DH.NUMTRANSVENDAST
AND   PCCOB.CODCOB = DH.CODCOB
AND   PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND   ((NVL(PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(DH.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND   NVL(DH.VALOR, 0) > 0
GROUP BY DH.NUMTRANSVENDAST, DH.DUPLIC, DH.PREST, DH.CODCOB, DH.DTVENC,
         DH.CODCOBSEFAZ, DH.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO, DH.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO, DH.NSUTEF, DH.BANDEIRACARTAO, DH.CORRESPONDENTE,PCCOB.INDPAG,
	       NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')), NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT), DH.CNPJRECEB, DH.IDTERMPAG
UNION ALL
SELECT DH.Numtransvendast AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       DH.DUPLIC ||' - '||DH.PREST AS PRESTACAO,
       DH.DUPLIC,
       DH.PREST,
       DH.DTVENC AS DTVENC,
       SUM(NVL(DH.VALORENTFUT, DH.VALOR)) AS VALOR,
       DH.CODCOB AS CODCOB,
       0 AS VALORDESC,
       DH.CODCOBSEFAZ,
       DH.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO AS RAZAO_CRED_CARTAO,
       DH.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       DH.NSUTEF AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       DH.BANDEIRACARTAO AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NVL(DH.CORRESPONDENTE, '2') AS TP_INTEGRA,
       MAX(DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT) DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'S' PREFATURAMENTO,
       PCCOB.INDPAG,
	     NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')) CNPJPAG,
       NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT) UFPAG,
       DH.CNPJRECEB,
       DH.IDTERMPAG
FROM  PCPRESTPREFAT DH, PCNFSAIDPREFAT, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE DH.STATUS = 'A'
AND   DH.DTDESD IS NULL
AND   DH.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND   PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA = DH.NUMTRANSVENDAST
AND   PCCOB.CODCOB = DH.CODCOB
AND   PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND   ((NVL(PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(DH.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND   NVL(DH.VALOR, 0) > 0
AND   DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT IS NULL
GROUP BY DH.NUMTRANSVENDAST, DH.DUPLIC, DH.PREST, DH.CODCOB, DH.DTVENC,
         DH.CODCOBSEFAZ, DH.RAZAOCREDENCCARTAO, DH.CNPJCREDENCCARTAO, DH.NSUTEF, DH.BANDEIRACARTAO, DH.CORRESPONDENTE,PCCOB.INDPAG,
	       NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]')), NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT), DH.CNPJRECEB, DH.IDTERMPAG
```


#### SQL_NFE_PARCELA_SAIDA_TROCO

```sql
SELECT DH.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       MAX((TO_CHAR(DH.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(DH.PREST))) AS PRESTACAO,
       MAX(DH.DUPLIC) AS DUPLIC,
       MAX(DH.PREST) AS PREST,
       TO_DATE('01/01/1899',
               'DD/MM/YYYY') AS DTVENC,
       ABS(SUM(NVL(DH.VALORENTFUT, DH.VALOR))) AS VALOR,
       MAX(DH.CODCOB) AS CODCOB,
       0 AS VALORDESC,
       NULL CODCOBSEFAZ,
       NULL AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       NULL AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       0 AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NULL AS TP_INTEGRA,
       MAX(DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT) DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'N' PREFATURAMENTO, 
       MAX(PCCOB.INDPAG) INDPAG,
	     MAX(NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]'))) CNPJPAG,
       MAX(NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT)) UFPAG,
       MAX(DH.CNPJRECEB) CNPJRECEB,
       MAX(DH.IDTERMPAG) IDTERMPAG
FROM  PCPREST DH, PCNFSAID, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE DH.STATUS = 'A'
AND   DH.CODCLI = PCNFSAID.CODCLI
AND   DH.DTDESD IS NULL
AND   DH.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND   DH.CODCOB IN ('TR', 'DOAC')
AND   PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = DH.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND   PCCOB.CODCOB = DH.CODCOB
AND   PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND   ((NVL(PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(DH.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
GROUP BY DH.NUMTRANSVENDA
UNION ALL
SELECT DH.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       MAX((TO_CHAR(DH.DUPLIC) || ' - ' || TO_CHAR(DH.PREST))) AS PRESTACAO,
       MAX(DH.DUPLIC) AS DUPLIC,
       MAX(DH.PREST) AS PREST,
       TO_DATE('01/01/1899',
               'DD/MM/YYYY') AS DTVENC,
       ABS(SUM(NVL(DH.VALORENTFUT, DH.VALOR))) AS VALOR,
       MAX(DH.CODCOB) AS CODCOB,
       0 AS VALORDESC,
       NULL CODCOBSEFAZ,
       NULL AS CNPJ_CRED_CARTAO,
       NULL AS NUMAUTOR_CARTAO,
       0 AS BANDEIRA_CARTAO,
       NULL AS TP_INTEGRA,
       MAX(DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT) DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT,
       'S' PREFATURAMENTO,
       MAX(PCCOB.INDPAG) INDPAG,
	     MAX(NVL(DH.CNPJPAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(PCCLIENT.CGCENT, '[^0-9]'))) CNPJPAG,
       MAX(NVL(DH.UFPAG, PCCLIENT.ESTENT)) UFPAG,
       MAX(DH.CNPJRECEB) CNPJRECEB,
       MAX(DH.IDTERMPAG) IDTERMPAG
FROM  PCPRESTPREFAT DH, PCNFSAIDPREFAT, PCCOB, PCCLIENT
WHERE DH.STATUS = 'A'
AND   DH.DTDESD IS NULL
AND   DH.DTESTORNO IS NULL
AND   DH.CODCOB IN ('TR', 'DOAC')
AND   PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMTRANSVENDA = DH.NUMTRANSVENDA
AND   PCCOB.CODCOB = DH.CODCOB
AND   PCCOB.CODCLIINTERMEDIADOR = PCCLIENT.CODCLI(+)
AND   ((NVL(PCNFSAIDPREFAT.NUMCUPOM,0) = 0) OR (PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('COBCUPOMNFE', PCNFSAIDPREFAT.CODFILIAL) = 'S'))
AND   NVL(PCCOB.CARTAO,'N') = 'N'
AND   NVL(DH.PERMITEESTORNO, 'S') = 'S'
AND   DH.DATACONSOLIDACAOPREFAT IS NULL
GROUP BY DH.NUMTRANSVENDA
```


#### SQL_NFE_RODAPE_SAIDA_COMP

```sql
SELECT S.NUMTRANSVENDA AS NUM_TRANSACAO,
       SUM(S.VLTOTAL) VALOR_TOTAL_PRODUTOS,
       SUM(DECODE(NVL(B.TIPO,
                      '1'),
                  '1',
                  NVL(B.VLBASE,
                      0),
                  0)) BASE_ICMS,
       SUM(DECODE(NVL(B.TIPO,
                      '1'),
                  '2',
                  NVL(B.VLBASE,
                      0),
                  0)) BASE_IPI,
       SUM(DECODE(NVL(B.TIPO,
                      '1'),
                  '1',
                  DECODE(NVL(B.VLICMS,
                             0),
                         0,
                         NVL(B.VLBASE,
                             0) * NVL(B.ALIQUOTA,
                                      0) / 100,
                         NVL(B.VLICMS,
                             0)),
                  0)) VALOR_ICMS,
       SUM(DECODE(NVL(B.TIPO,
                      '1'),
                  '2',
                  DECODE(NVL(B.VLICMS,
                             0),
                         0,
                         NVL(B.VLBASE,
                             0) * NVL(B.ALIQUOTA,
                                      0) / 100,
                         NVL(B.VLICMS,
                             0)),
                  0)) VALOR_IPI,
       (SUM(S.VLTOTAL) - SUM(S.ICMSRETIDO) -
       SUM(DECODE(NVL(B.TIPO,
                       '1'),
                   '2',
                   DECODE(NVL(B.VLICMS,
                              0),
                          0,
                          NVL(B.VLBASE,
                              0) * NVL(B.ALIQUOTA,
                                       0) / 100,
                          NVL(B.VLICMS,
                              0)),
                   0))) VALOR_TOTAL,
       SUM(S.BCST) BASE_ST,
       SUM(S.ICMSRETIDO) VALOR_ST,
       S.TRANSPORTADORA AS TRANSPORTADOR,
       S.CGCFRETE AS CNPJ_TRANSPORTADOR,
       S.IEFRETE AS IE_TRANSPORTADOR,
       S.UFFRETE AS ESTADO_TRANSPORTADOR,
       S.PLACAVEIC AS PLACA,
       SUM(S.VLFRETE) AS VALOR_FRETE,
       SUM(NVL(S.VLOUTRASDESP,
               NVL(S.VLOUTRAS,
                   0))) AS VALOR_OUTRO,       
       CASE WHEN NVL(S.FINALIDADENFE, 'X') IN ('A', 'C', '2', '3') THEN
                 9 
          ELSE
                 DECODE(NVL(S.TIPOFRETE,
                            'C'),
                        'F',
                        1,
                        0)
       END AS MODALIDADE_FRETE,
       0 AS VALOR_TOTAL_SEGURO,
       MAX(NVL(S.VLOUTRAS,0)) AS VALOR_OUTROS,
       MAX(NVL(S.VLDESCONTO,0)) AS VALOR_DESCONTO,
       S.FINALIDADENFE       
FROM   PCNFBASE B,
       PCNFSAID S
WHERE  B.NUMTRANSVENDA = S.NUMTRANSVENDA
GROUP  BY S.NUMTRANSVENDA,
       S.TRANSPORTADORA,
       S.CGCFRETE,
       S.IEFRETE,
       S.UFFRETE,
       S.PLACAVEIC,
       S.FINALIDADENFE,
       S.TIPOFRETE
```


#### VIEWPCPEDCMXMA

```sql
SELECT   pcpedc.numped,
            pcpedc.DATA,
            pcpedc.vltotal,
            pcpedc.codcli,
            pcpedc.codusur,
            pcpedc.dtentrega,
            pcpedc.vltabela,
            pcpedc.codfilial,
            pcpedc.vldesconto,
            pcpedc.tipovenda,
            pcpedc.obs,
            pcpedc.vlcustoreal,
            pcpedc.vlcustofin,
            pcpedc.vlfrete,
            pcpedc.vloutrasdesp,
            pcpedc.totpeso,
            pcpedc.totvolume,
            pcpedc.codpraca,
            pcpedc.numitens,
            pcpedc.codemitente,
            pcpedc.dtcancel,
            pcpedc.posicao,
            pcpedc.vlatend,
            pcpedc.operacao,
            pcpedc.numcar,
            pcpedc.codcob,
            pcpedc.hora,
            pcpedc.minuto,
            pcpedc.numseqentrega,
            pcpedc.custoentrega,
            pcpedc.codsupervisor,
            pcpedc.condvenda,
            pcpedc.percvenda,
            pcpedc.obs1,
            pcpedc.obs2,
            pcpedc.perdesc,
            pcpedc.codplpag,
            pcpedc.numtransvenda,
            pcpedc.prazomedio,
            pcpedc.obsentrega1,
            pcpedc.obsentrega2,
            pcpedc.obsentrega3,
            pcpedc.codepto,
            pcpedc.tipoembalagem,
            pcpedc.dtlibera,
            pcpedc.codmotorista,
            pcpedc.codfilialnf,
            pcpedc.codmotbloqueio,
            pcpedc.codmotcancel,
            pcpedc.numvolume,
            pcpedc.numseqentr,
            pcpedc.codfunccx,
            pcpedc.numcaixa,
            pcpedc.numnota,
            pcpedc.vlcustorep,
            pcpedc.vlcustocont,
            pcpedc.numnotamanif,
            pcpedc.seriemanif,
            pcpedc.origemped,
            pcpedc.horafat,
            pcpedc.minutofat,
            pcpedc.vlbonific,
            NVL (pcpedcmxma.perccommed, 0) AS perccommed,
            NVL (pcpedcmxma.vlst, 0) AS vlst,
            pcpedc.dtiniciodigitacaopedido,
            pcpedc.dtfimdigitacaopedido,
            pcpedc.dtaberturapedpalm,
            pcpedc.dtfechamentopedpalm,
            pcpedc.LATITUDE,
            pcpedc.LONGITUDE,
            pcpedc.PRECISAOLATLNG,
            PCPEDC.NUMPEDRCA,
            PCPEDC.NUMPEDORIGEM
     FROM   pcpedc, pcpedcmxma
    WHERE   pcpedcmxma.numped(+) = pcpedc.numped
```


#### VIEW_B2B_ESTOQUE

```sql
SELECT DECODE(NVL(OBSERVACAO, ''), '', CODAUXILIAR, OBSERVACAO) SKUID,
       DECODE(NVL(OBSERVACAO, ''), '',
              CASE WHEN ESTOQUE <= 0 THEN
                 0
              ELSE
                 1
              END, 0) STOCKTYPE,
       'controlUnitQuantity' STOCKTYPESOURCENAME,
       DECODE(NVL(OBSERVACAO,''), '', ESTOQUE_ECOMMERCE,0) QUANTITY, 
       FILAID
FROM (SELECT 
	CASE 
	  WHEN (FNC_B2B_CONVERSAO(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, C.TIPOCONVERSAO, C.FATORCONVERSAO) > 1 AND C.TIPOCONVERSAO = 'AL') THEN  
	    TO_CHAR(C.CODAUXILIAR) || 'C' || FNC_B2B_CONVERSAO(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, C.TIPOCONVERSAO, C.FATORCONVERSAO) 
	  WHEN (FNC_B2B_CONVERSAO(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, C.TIPOCONVERSAO, C.FATORCONVERSAO) > 1 AND C.TIPOCONVERSAO <> 'AL')  THEN  
	    TO_CHAR(P.CODAUXILIAR) || 'C' || FNC_B2B_CONVERSAO(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, C.TIPOCONVERSAO, C.FATORCONVERSAO)
	  WHEN (C.TIPOCONVERSAO = 'AL')  THEN  
	    TO_CHAR(C.CODAUXILIAR)
          WHEN (C.TIPOCONVERSAO <> 'AL')  THEN  
	    TO_CHAR(P.CODAUXILIAR)                           
        END AS CODAUXILIAR,  			 
			 
        PKG_ESTOQUE.ESTOQUE_DISPONIVEL(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, '') - (E.QTGIRODIA * NVL(B.NUMDIASESTOQUE,0)) ESTOQUE,
        TRUNC((PKG_ESTOQUE.ESTOQUE_DISPONIVEL(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, '') * P.QTUNIT) / FNC_B2B_CONVERSAO(P.CODPROD, F.CODFILIAL, C.TIPOCONVERSAO, C.FATORCONVERSAO) * (NVL(B.PRCESTOQUE,0) / 100)) ESTOQUE_ECOMMERCE,
        C.TIPOINTEGRACAO,
        F.OBSERVACAO,
        F.ROWID FILAID
      FROM PCEST E,
        PCPRODUT P,
        PCECOMMERCEB2BFILA F,
        PCECOMMERCEB2BPRODUTO C,
        PCECOMMERCEB2B B
      WHERE E.CODPROD = P.CODPROD
        AND C.CODPROD = P.CODPROD
        AND C.CODFILIAL = F.CODFILIAL
        AND P.rowid = F.ID
        AND E.CODFILIAL = F.CODFILIAL
        AND B.CODFILIAL = F.CODFILIAL
        AND F.TIPOINTEGRACAO = B.TIPOINTEGRACAO
        AND F.TABELA = 'ESTOQUE'
        AND ROWNUM < 151 -- Deverá buscar apenas os 150 primeiros registros em cada consulta
      ORDER BY F.DTINCLUSAO) TAB
```


#### VIEW_B2B_LIMCRED

```sql
select c.cgcent customerDocumentNr,
       funcoesvendas.buscarlimcredcli(c.codcli, NULL, 'D', 'S') value,
       f.rowid filaid
  from pcclient c, pcecommerceb2bfila f
  where c.rowid = f.id
   and f.tabela = 'LIMITE'
```


#### VIEW_B2B_STATUSCLI

```sql
select c.cgcent customerDocumentNr,
       e.situacaoecommerceb2b status,
       f.rowid filaid
  from pcclient c, pcecommerceb2bfila f, PCECOMMERCEB2BCLIENTE e
 where c.rowid = f.id
   and e.codcli = c.codcli
   and f.tabela = 'CLIENTE'
```


#### VIEW_B2B_TRACKING

```sql
SELECT DISTINCT "ORDERID","OCCURRENCEDT","CONTROLPOINTID","CONTROLPOINTNM","ISSUERDOCUMENTNR","INVOICENUMBER","INVOICESERIALNUMBER","INVOICEEMISSIONDATE","INVOICEELETRONICKEY","SKUID","UNITPRICE","PREPAREDQT","FILAID","TIPOINTEGRACAO" 
FROM (SELECT C.NUMPEDWEB ORDERID,
             SYSDATE OCCURRENCEDT,
             F.OBSERVACAO CONTROLPOINTID,
```
