```sql
              ) QTBONIFIC,
          (CASE
              WHEN ((PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB'))
                 THEN 0
              ELSE (NVL (PCMOV.VLIPI, 0) * NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0))
           END
          ) VLIPI,
          (CASE
              WHEN ((PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB'))
                 THEN (NVL (PCMOV.VLIPI, 0) * NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0))
              ELSE 0
           END
          ) VLIPIBONIFIC,
          (CASE
              WHEN ((PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB'))
                 THEN 0
              ELSE (NVL (ROUND (DECODE (PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                                        7, DECODE (NVL (PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'),
                                                   'C', PCMOV.QT,
                                                   PCMOV.QTCONT
                                                  )
                                         * (  NVL (PCMOV.ST, 0)
                                            + NVL (PCMOVCOMPLE.VLSTTRANSFCD,
                                                   0)
                                           ),
                                          PCMOV.QT
                                        * (  NVL (PCMOV.ST, 0)
                                           + NVL (PCMOVCOMPLE.VLSTTRANSFCD, 0)
                                          )
                                       ),
                                2
                               ),
                         0
                        )
                   )
           END
          ) ICMSRETIDO,
          ROUND (DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER,
                         'SB', 0,
                         PCMOV.QTCONT * PCMOVCOMPLE.VLFECP
                        ),
                 2
                ) AS VLFECP,
          DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER,
                  'SB', PCMOV.QTCONT * PCMOVCOMPLE.VLFECP,
                  0
                 ) AS VLFECPBONIFIC,
          (CASE
              WHEN ((PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB'))
                 THEN (NVL (ROUND (DECODE (PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                                           7, DECODE (NVL (PCMOV.TIPOITEM,
                                                           'C'),
                                                      'C', PCMOV.QT,
                                                      PCMOV.QTCONT
                                                     )
                                            * (  NVL (PCMOV.ST, 0)
                                               + NVL
                                                    (PCMOVCOMPLE.VLSTTRANSFCD,
                                                     0
                                                    )
                                              ),
                                             PCMOV.QT
                                           * (  NVL (PCMOV.ST, 0)
                                              + NVL (PCMOVCOMPLE.VLSTTRANSFCD,
                                                     0
                                                    )
                                             )
                                          ),
                                   2
                                  ),
                            0
                           )
                      )
              ELSE 0
           END
          ) ICMSRETIDOBONIFIC,

          /*Campos acrescentados para atender a consolidação de dados na 504 e 507*/
          TRUNC (  (DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER,
                            'E', (NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0)),
                            'EB', (NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0)),
                            0
                           )
                   )
                 * (NVL (PCMOV.PUNIT, 0)),
                 6
                ) VLENT,
          TRUNC ((DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER,
                          'E', (NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0)),
                          'EB', (NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0)),
                          0
                         )
                 ),
                 2
                ) QTENT,
          TRUNC (  (DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER, 'ED', (NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0)), 0))
                 * (NVL (PCMOV.PUNIT, 0)),
                 6
                ) VLDEVOLCLI,
          TRUNC ((DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER, 'ED', (NVL (PCMOV.QT, 0)), 0)),
                 6
                ) QTDEVOLCLI,
          NVL (PCNFSAID.CONSUMIDORFINAL, 'N') CONSUMIDORFINAL,
          NVL (PCNFSAID.TIPOFJ, PCCLIENT.TIPOFJ) TIPOFJ,
          NVL (PCNFSAID.IEENT, 'ISENTO') IEENT,
          NVL
             (ROUND ((  NVL (PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0)
                      * DECODE (PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA,
                                5, 0,
                                6, 0,
                                11, 0,
                                12, 0,
                                DECODE (PCMOV.CODOPER,
                                        'SB', 0,
                                        DECODE (NVL (PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C'),
                                                'C', PCMOV.QT,
                                                PCMOV.QTCONT
                                               )
                                       )
                               )
                     ),
                     2
                    ),
              0
             ) VLREPASSE,
          PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO, PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM, PCPRODUT.NUMORIGINAL,
          PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR, PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ, PCCLIENT.ESTENT,
          PCCLIENT.CLIENTE, PCCLIENT.CGCENT, PCCLIENT.MUNICENT,
          PCPRODUT.CODMARCA, PCPRODUT.CODLINHAPROD, PCPRODUT.CLASSE,
          PCPRODUT.CLASSEVENDA, PCMOV.NUMPED, PCMOV.NUMSEQ,
          (NVL (PCMOV.VLVERBACMV, 0) * PCMOV.QT) AS VLVERBACMV,
          (NVL (PCMOV.VLVERBACMVCLI, 0) * PCMOV.QT) AS VLVERBACMVCLI,
          PCMOV.PERCDESCFIN, (ROUND (PCMOV.VLPIS * PCMOV.QT, 2)) VLRPIS,
          (ROUND (PCMOV.VLCOFINS * PCMOV.QT, 2)) VLRCOFINS,
          (ROUND (  (NVL(PCMOVCOMPLE.VLICMS,0) + NVL(PCMOVCOMPLE.VLACRESCIMOFUNCEP,0))
                  * PCMOV.QT,
                  2
                 )
          ) VLRICMS,
          PCNFSAID.TIPOVENDA
     FROM PCNFSAID,
          PCCLIENT,
          PCPRACA,
          PCMOV,
          PCPRODUT,
          PCMOVCOMPLE,
          PCATIVI ATIVI_PRINCIPAL,
          PCATIVI ATIVIMOV_PRINCIPAL
    WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
      AND PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA = PCMOV.NUMNOTA
      AND PCMOV.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      AND PCCLIENT.CODPRACA = PCPRACA.CODPRACA
      AND PCNFSAID.CODCLI = PCCLIENT.CODCLI
      AND PCCLIENT.CODATV1 = ATIVI_PRINCIPAL.CODATIV(+)
      AND PCNFSAID.CODATV1 = ATIVIMOV_PRINCIPAL.CODATIV(+)
      --AND NVL (PCNFSAID.TIPOVENDA, 'X') NOT IN ('SR', 'DF')
      AND PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NULL
      AND PCMOV.NUMTRANSITEM = PCMOVCOMPLE.NUMTRANSITEM(+)
      AND NVL (PCMOV.TIPOITEM, 'C') IN ('C', 'N')
      AND PCNFSAID.CODFISCAL <> 0
      AND PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA >= (SELECT MIN (DTSAIDA)
                                 FROM PCNFSAID)
```


#### VW_BANDEIRAOPERADORACARTAO

```sql
( 
   SELECT '01' AS CODIGO, 'Visa' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '02' AS CODIGO, 'Mastercard' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '03' AS CODIGO, 'American Express' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '04' AS CODIGO, 'Sorocred' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '05' AS CODIGO, 'Diners Club' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '06' AS CODIGO, 'Elo' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '07' AS CODIGO, 'Hipercard' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '08' AS CODIGO, 'Aura' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '09' AS CODIGO, 'Cabal' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL 
   UNION 
   SELECT '99' AS CODIGO, 'Outros' AS DESCRICAO FROM DUAL)
```


#### VW_CLIENTESRCA

```sql
SELECT
  C.CODCLI,
  R.CODUSUR,
  R.TIPOVEND,
  NVL(C.CODUSUR1,C.CODUSUR2) CODUSURPADRAO
FROM
  PCCLIENT C,
  PCUSUARI R
WHERE
  R.CODUSUR IN (C.CODUSUR1,C.CODUSUR2)
UNION 
SELECT
  C.CODCLI,
  R.CODUSUR,
  R.TIPOOPER,
  R.CODUSURPADRAO
FROM
  PCCLIENT C,
  PCUSURCLI R
WHERE
  R.CODCLI=C.CODCLI
```


#### VW_CREDITO_CLIENTE

```sql
SELECT pcclient.codcli,
            NVL (pedidos_pendentes.vlatend, 0)
          + NVL (cr_aberto.valor, 0) total_receber
     FROM pcclient,
          (SELECT   codcli, SUM (NVL (vlatend, 0)) AS vlatend
               FROM pcpedc
              WHERE posicao IN ('L', 'M')
           GROUP BY codcli) pedidos_pendentes,
          (SELECT   codcli, SUM (NVL (valor, 0)) valor
               FROM pcprest
              WHERE dtpag IS NULL
           GROUP BY codcli) cr_aberto
    WHERE pcclient.dtexclusao IS NULL
      AND pcclient.codcli = pedidos_pendentes.codcli(+)
      AND pcclient.codcli = cr_aberto.codcli(+)
```


#### VW_EVENTOS_PEDIDOS

```sql
SELECT 'Iniciou Digitação pedido de venda' AS ID,
       1 AS CONTADOR,
       NVL(DTINICIODIGITACAOPEDIDO,DTABERTURAPEDPALM) AS DTINICIO,
       CODEMITENTE,
       DATA,
       CODCLI,
       POSICAO,
       NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
 AND (DTINICIODIGITACAOPEDIDO IS NOT NULL) OR (DTABERTURAPEDPALM IS NOT NULL)
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Finalizou digitação Pedido de venda' AS ID,
       2 AS CONTADOR,
       NVL(DTFIMDIGITACAOPEDIDO,DTFECHAMENTOPEDPALM) AS DTINICIO,
       CODEMITENTE,
       DATA,
       CODCLI,
       POSICAO,
       NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
 AND (DTFIMDIGITACAOPEDIDO IS NOT NULL) OR (DTFECHAMENTOPEDPALM IS NOT NULL)
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0
 
UNION

SELECT 'Emissão Mapa de Separação Pedido' AS ID,
       3 AS CONTADOR,
       DTEMISSAOMAPA AS DTINICIO,
       CODFUNCEMISSAOMAPA as CODEMITENTE,
       DTEMISSAOMAPA AS DATA,
       CODCLI,
       POSICAO,
       NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
  AND DTEMISSAOMAPA IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Emissão Mapa de Separação Carregamento' AS ID,
       4 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DATAHORAMAPA AS DTINICIO,
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCMAPA AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCCARREG.DATAHORAMAPA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL       
  FROM PCPEDC, PCCARREG
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
   AND 1=1
     AND PCCARREG.DATAHORAMAPA IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Inicio Separação' AS ID,
       5 AS CONTADOR,
       DTINICIALSEP AS DTINICIO,
       CODFUNCSEP AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
      AND PCPEDC.DTINICIALSEP IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Fim Separação' AS ID,
       6 AS CONTADOR,
       DTFINALSEP AS DTINICIO,
       CODFUNCSEP AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
       AND PCPEDC.DTFINALSEP IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Inicio Checkout  Pedido' AS ID,
       7 AS CONTADOR,
       DTINICIALCHECKOUT AS DTINICIO,
       CODFUNCCONF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
        AND DTINICIALCHECKOUT IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Fim Checkout Pedido' AS ID,
       8 AS CONTADOR,
       DTFINALCHECKOUT AS DTINICIO,
       CODFUNCCONF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
         AND DTFINALCHECKOUT IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0
 
UNION

SELECT 'Inicio Checkout  Carregamento' AS ID,
       9 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DTINICIOCHECKOUT AS DTINICIO,
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCCONF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCPEDC, PCCARREG
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
         AND PCCARREG.DTINICIOCHECKOUT IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Fim Checkout Carregamento' AS ID,
       10 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DTFIMCHECKOUT AS DTINICIO,
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCCONF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL      
  FROM PCPEDC, PCCARREG
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
         AND PCCARREG.DTFIMCHECKOUT IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Cortes' AS ID,
       11 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCORTEI.DATA AS DTINICIO,
       PCCORTEI.CODFUNC AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCCORTEI.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCCORTEI.CODPROD,
       PCCORTEI.QTCORTADA,
       PCCORTEI.MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL      
  FROM PCCORTEI, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCCORTEI.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED
         AND PCCORTEI.DATA IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Montagem de Carga' AS ID,
       12 AS CONTADOR,
       TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(DATAMON, 'dd/mm/yyyy') || ' ' ||
               LEAST(NVL(HORAMON, '00'), 23) || ':' ||
               LEAST(NVL(MINUTOMON, '00'), 59) || ':' ||
               LEAST(NVL(segundomon, '00'),59),  
               'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') DTINICIO,      
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCMON AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCCARREG.DTSAIDA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL      
       
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
     AND PCCARREG.DTSAIDA IS NOT NULL
     AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Faturamento' AS ID,
       13 AS CONTADOR,
       --PCNFSAID.DTFAT AS DTINICIO, 
       TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTFAT, 'dd/mm/yyyy') || ' ' ||
       LEAST(NVL(PCPEDC.HORAFAT, '00'), 23) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL(PCPEDC.MINUTOFAT, '00'), 59) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL('00', '00'),59),  
       'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') DTINICIO,              
       
       NVL(PCNFSAID.CODEMITENTE,DECODE(PCPEDC.NUMCAR,0,NULL,PCCARREG.CODFUNCFAT)) AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA AS DATA,
       PCNFSAID.CODCLI,
       'F' AS POSICAO,
       PCNFSAID.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL            
  FROM PCNFSAID, PCCARREG , PCPEDC
 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
    AND PCNFSAID.DTFAT IS NOT NULL
    AND PCNFSAID.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED
    -- AND PCNFSAID.NUMCAR <> 0
    

UNION


SELECT 'Do faturamento a saida do Veículo' AS ID,
       14 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DTSAIDAVEICULO AS DTINICIO,
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCSAIDACAR AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCCARREG.DTSAIDA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL     
       
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
     AND PCCARREG.DTSAIDAVEICULO IS NOT NULL
     AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'Saida do Veiculo ao retorno do veiculo' AS ID,
       15 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DTRETORNO AS DTINICIO,
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCRETORNOCAR AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL        
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
      AND PCCARREG.DTRETORNO IS NOT NULL
     AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0

UNION

SELECT 'acerto de carga' AS ID,
       16 AS CONTADOR,       
       TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PCCARREG.DTFECHA, 'dd/mm/yyyy') || ' ' ||
       LEAST(NVL(HORAFECHA, '00'), 23) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL(MINUTOFECHA, '00'), 59) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL(PCCARREG.SEGUNDOSFECHA, '00'),59),  
       'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') DTINICIO,         
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCRETORNOCAR AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL               
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCCARREG.NUMCAR = PCPEDC.NUMCAR
      AND PCCARREG.DTFECHA IS NOT NULL
     AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0
      
UNION

SELECT 'Transferencias entre carregamentos' AS ID,
       17 AS CONTADOR,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.DTTRANSF AS DTINICIO,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.CODFUNCTRANSF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.MOTIVOTRANSF AS MOTIVO,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.NUMCARANTERIOR,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.NUMCARATUAL        
  FROM PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCPEDC.NUMTRANSVENDA
      AND PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.DTTRANSF IS NOT NULL
     AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0
      
      
UNION

SELECT PCTABDEV.MOTIVO AS ID,
       18 AS CONTADOR,
       PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.DTLANC AS DTINICIO,
       PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.CODUSURLANC AS CODEMITENTE,
       TRUNC(PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.DTLANC) AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       PCTABDEV.MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL
  FROM PCEVENTOSPEDIDO, PCPEDC, PCTABDEV
 WHERE PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCPEDC.NUMTRANSVENDA
      AND PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.Cdmotivo = PCTABDEV.CODDEVOL
      AND PCTABDEV.TIPO = 'EP'      
      AND PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.DTLANC IS NOT NULL
      AND PCPEDC.NUMCAR <> 0
```


#### VW_EVENTOS_PEDIDOS_WMS

```sql
SELECT 'Iniciou Digitação pedido de venda' AS ID,
       1 AS CONTADOR,
       NVL(DTINICIODIGITACAOPEDIDO,DTABERTURAPEDPALM) AS DTINICIO,
       CODEMITENTE,
       DATA,
       CODCLI,
       POSICAO,
       NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
 AND (DTINICIODIGITACAOPEDIDO IS NOT NULL) OR (DTABERTURAPEDPALM IS NOT NULL)


UNION

SELECT 'Finalizou digitação Pedido de venda' AS ID,
       2 AS CONTADOR,
       NVL(DTFIMDIGITACAOPEDIDO,DTFECHAMENTOPEDPALM) AS DTINICIO,
       CODEMITENTE,
       DATA,
       CODCLI,
       POSICAO,
       NUMPED,
       NUMCAR,
       NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC
 WHERE 1=1
 AND (DTFIMDIGITACAOPEDIDO IS NOT NULL) OR (DTFECHAMENTOPEDPALM IS NOT NULL)


UNION
 
SELECT 'Exportação WMS' AS ID,
       3 AS CONTADOR,
       PCPEDC.DTWMS AS DTINICIO,
       PCWMS.CODFUNCGERA AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DTWMS AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCWMS.NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCWMS
 WHERE PCWMS.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED
  AND DTWMS IS NOT NULL

UNION


SELECT 'Mapa de Separação' AS ID,
       4 AS CONTADOR,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DATAGERACAO AS DTINICIO,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODFUNCGER AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DATAGERACAO AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMTRANSWMS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMOS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCMOVENDPEND
 WHERE PCMOVENDPEND.DATAGERACAO IS NOT NULL
 AND PCPEDC.NUMPED = PCMOVENDPEND.NUMPED
 
  UNION
  
 
SELECT 'Última impressão do Mapa de Separação' AS ID,
       5 AS CONTADOR,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTULTIMP AS DTINICIO,
       PCMOVENDPEND.FUNCULTIMP AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTULTIMP AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMTRANSWMS NUMTRANSWMS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMOS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCMOVENDPEND
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMPED =  PCMOVENDPEND.NUMPED
     AND PCMOVENDPEND.DTULTIMP IS NOT NULL

UNION

SELECT 'Inicio OS' AS ID,
       6 AS CONTADOR,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTINICIOOS AS DTINICIO,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODFUNCOS AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTINICIOOS AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMTRANSWMS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMOS,
       NULL  CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCMOVENDPEND
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMPED =  PCMOVENDPEND.NUMPED
     AND PCMOVENDPEND.DTINICIOOS IS NOT NULL
     
UNION


SELECT 'Inicio Conferencia' AS ID,
       7 AS CONTADOR,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTINICIOCONFERENCIA AS DTINICIO,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODFUNCCONF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTINICIOCONFERENCIA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMTRANSWMS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMOS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCMOVENDPEND
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMPED =  PCMOVENDPEND.NUMPED
   AND PCMOVENDPEND.DTINICIOCONFERENCIA IS NOT NULL
 
UNION

SELECT 'Fim Conferencia OS ' AS ID,
       8 AS CONTADOR,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTFIMCONFERENCIA AS DTINICIO,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODFUNCCONF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTFIMCONFERENCIA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMTRANSWMS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMOS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCMOVENDPEND
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMPED =  PCMOVENDPEND.NUMPED
     AND PCMOVENDPEND.DTFIMCONFERENCIA IS NOT NULL
     
UNION

SELECT 'Fim OS' AS ID,
       9 AS CONTADOR,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTFIMOS AS DTINICIO,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODFUNCOSFIM AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCMOVENDPEND.DTFIMOS AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMTRANSWMS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.NUMOS,
       PCMOVENDPEND.CODENDERECO
  FROM PCPEDC, PCMOVENDPEND
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMPED =  PCMOVENDPEND.NUMPED
     AND PCMOVENDPEND.DTFIMOS IS NOT NULL 
      
 
UNION

SELECT 'Montagem de Carga' AS ID,
       10 AS CONTADOR,
       TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(DTSAIDA, 'dd/mm/yyyy') || ' ' ||
               LEAST(NVL(HORAMON, '00'), 23) || ':' ||
               LEAST(NVL(MINUTOMON, '00'), 59) || ':' ||
               LEAST(NVL(segundomon, '00'),59),  
               'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') DTINICIO,      
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCMON AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCCARREG.DTSAIDA AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,    
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO       
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
     AND PCCARREG.DTSAIDA IS NOT NULL

UNION

SELECT 'Faturamento' AS ID,
       11 AS CONTADOR,
       TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PCNFSAID.DTFAT, 'dd/mm/yyyy') || ' ' ||
       LEAST(NVL(PCPEDC.HORAFAT, '00'), 23) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL(PCPEDC.MINUTOFAT, '00'), 59) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL('00', '00'),59),  
       'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') DTINICIO,  
       NVL(PCNFSAID.CODEMITENTE,DECODE(PCPEDC.NUMCAR,0,NULL,PCCARREG.CODFUNCFAT)) AS CODEMITENTE,       
       PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA AS DATA,
       PCNFSAID.CODCLI,
       'F' AS POSICAO,
       PCNFSAID.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO 
  FROM PCNFSAID, PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
    AND PCNFSAID.DTFAT IS NOT NULL
    AND PCNFSAID.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED

UNION
    
SELECT 'Do faturamento a saida do Veículo' AS ID,
       12 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DTSAIDAVEICULO AS DTINICIO,

       NULL CODENDERECO      
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
     AND PCCARREG.DTSAIDAVEICULO IS NOT NULL

UNION

SELECT 'Saida do Veiculo ao retorno do veiculo' AS ID,
       13 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCARREG.DTRETORNO AS DTINICIO,
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCRETORNOCAR AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,

       PCPEDC.NUMPED,

       NULL CODENDERECO      
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCPEDC.NUMCAR = PCCARREG.NUMCAR
      AND PCCARREG.DTRETORNO IS NOT NULL

UNION

SELECT 'acerto de carga' AS ID,
       14 AS CONTADOR,       
       TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PCCARREG.DTFECHA, 'dd/mm/yyyy') || ' ' ||
       LEAST(NVL(HORAFECHA, '00'), 23) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL(MINUTOFECHA, '00'), 59) || ':' ||
       LEAST(NVL(PCCARREG.SEGUNDOSFECHA, '00'),59),  
       'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') DTINICIO,         
       PCCARREG.CODFUNCRETORNOCAR AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCCARREG.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       NULL MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO                
  FROM PCCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCCARREG.NUMCAR = PCPEDC.NUMCAR
      AND PCCARREG.DTFECHA IS NOT NULL


UNION

SELECT 'Cortes' AS ID,
       15 AS CONTADOR,
       PCCORTEI.DATA AS DTINICIO,
       PCCORTEI.CODFUNC AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCCORTEI.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       PCCORTEI.CODPROD,
       PCCORTEI.QTCORTADA,
       PCCORTEI.MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO             
  FROM PCCORTEI, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCCORTEI.NUMPED = PCPEDC.NUMPED
         AND PCCORTEI.DATA IS NOT NULL

UNION

SELECT 'Transferencias entre carregamentos' AS ID,
       16 AS CONTADOR,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.DTTRANSF AS DTINICIO,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.CODFUNCTRANSF AS CODEMITENTE,
       PCPEDC.DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.MOTIVOTRANSF AS MOTIVO,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.NUMCARANTERIOR,
       PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO      
  FROM PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG, PCPEDC
 WHERE PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCPEDC.NUMTRANSVENDA
      AND PCLOGTRANSFNFCARREG.DTTRANSF IS NOT NULL
      
      
UNION

SELECT PCTABDEV.MOTIVO AS ID,
       17 AS CONTADOR,
       PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.DTLANC AS DTINICIO,
       PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.CODUSURLANC AS CODEMITENTE,
       TRUNC(PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.DTLANC) AS DATA,
       PCPEDC.CODCLI,
       PCPEDC.POSICAO,
       PCPEDC.NUMPED,
       PCPEDC.NUMCAR,
       PCPEDC.NUMNOTA,
       NULL CODPROD,
       NULL QTCORTADA,
       PCTABDEV.MOTIVO,
       NULL NUMCARANTERIOR,
       NULL NUMCARATUAL,
       NULL NUMTRANSWMS,
       NULL NUMOS,
       NULL CODENDERECO    
  FROM PCEVENTOSPEDIDO, PCPEDC, PCTABDEV
 WHERE PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCPEDC.NUMTRANSVENDA
      AND PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.Cdmotivo = PCTABDEV.CODDEVOL
      AND PCTABDEV.TIPO = 'EP'      
      AND PCEVENTOSPEDIDO.DTLANC IS NOT NULL
```


#### VW_FORMASPAGAMENTONFE

```sql
( 
 --view retorna os códigos de cobrança da sefaz 
 --utilizado princiopalmente na rotina 522 
 --criado pela rotina 500 
  SELECT PCCOBSEFAZ.CODCOBSEFAZ AS CODIGO, 
         PCCOBSEFAZ.DESCRICAO 
   FROM PCCOBSEFAZ 
  WHERE NVL(PCCOBSEFAZ.ATIVO , 'S') = 'S' 
) 
ORDER BY CODIGO
```


#### VW_INTEGRA_DEVOLUCAO_AVULSA

```sql
SELECT 2 AS TIPO_MOV_DEVOLUCAO_VIEW
      ,PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT
      ,PCNFENT.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFENT.SERIE
      ,PCNFENT.ESPECIE
      ,PCNFENT.CHAVENFE
      ,NVL(PCNFENT.VLTOTGER,0) AS VLTOTGER
      ,NVL(PCNFENT.VLTOTAL,0) AS VLTOTAL
      ,PCNFENT.CODFORNECFRETE
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFENT.CODFORNEC,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODCLI,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFENT.CODFORNEC,0) END AS CODCLI
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODUSUR,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL,0) END AS CODUSUR
      ,PCMOV.COMPRACONSIGNADO
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIAL
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALNF
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALRETIRA
      ,PCMOV.NUMSEQ
      ,PCMOV.IVA
      ,PCMOV.PAUTA
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) AS BASEICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) AS PERCICM
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) / 100) AS VLICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ICMSRESSARC,0) AS ICMSRESSARC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ST,0) AS ST
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODFISCAL
      ,PCMOV.SITTRIBUT AS SITTRIBUTVENDA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICST,0) BASEICST
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0)) AS VLBASE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCDESC, 0) AS PERCDESC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0) AS VLDESCONTO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0) AS VLREPASSE
      ,PCMOV.CODDEVOL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIVA,0) AS PERCIVA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIPI,0) AS PERCIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI,0)  AS VLIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCBASERED,0) AS PERCBASERED
      ,PCMOV.PERCFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLPIS,0) AS VLPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERPIS,0) AS PERPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCOFINS,0) AS PERCOFINS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE,0) AS VLFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO,0) AS VLFRETE_RATEIO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCST,0) AS PERCST
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS1,0) AS ALIQICMS1
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS2,0) AS ALIQICMS2
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOCONT,0) AS CUSTOCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOULTENT,0) AS CUSTOULTENT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN,0) AS CUSTOFIN
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOREAL,0) AS CUSTOREAL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS,0) AS VLOUTROS
      ,PCMOV.BRINDE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP,0) AS VLOUTRASDESP
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNECPRINC
      ,PCFORNEC.FORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBFORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CGCAUX
      ,PCFORNEC.CODCOMPRADOR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBPRODUTO
      ,PCPRODUT.OBS2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODPRINC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.CODEPTO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSEC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODCATEGORIA
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSUBCATEGORIA
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') AS TIPOMERC
      ,PCPRODUT.IMPORTADO
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   END AS QTUNIT
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) END AS QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CUSTOREPTAB
      ,PCPRODUT.VOLUME
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADE
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADEMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO, 0)  AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ, 0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,PCPRODUT.SITTRIBUT
      ,TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(NVL((SELECT AF.ALIENACAO FROM PCALIENAFORNEC AF WHERE AF.CATEGORIA = 14 AND AF.REFWINTHOR = TO_CHAR(PCPRODUT.CODPROD) AND ROWNUM = 1),'0'),',','.')) AS FATOR
      ,PCMOV.DTMOV
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) END AS QUANTIDADE_MOVIMENTADA
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) END AS VALOR_UNITARIO
      ,0 AS NUMTRANSVENDA
      ,0 AS CONDVENDA
  FROM PCNFENT
      ,PCESTCOM
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCFORNEC
 WHERE PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT = PCMOV.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT = PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD       = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC     = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
   AND NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') NOT IN('CB')
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCNFENT.TIPODESCARGA IN('6','7','T') 
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER = 'ED' 
   AND NVL(PCNFENT.OBS,'XX') <> 'NF CANCELADA' 
   AND PCMOV.DTCANCEL IS NULL
   AND PCNFENT.CODFISCAL IN (131, 132, 231, 232, 199, 299)
   AND NVL(PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA,0) = 0
```


#### VW_INTEGRA_DEVOLUCAO_TOTAL

```sql
SELECT 1 AS TIPO_MOV_DEVOLUCAO_VIEW
      ,PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT
      ,PCNFENT.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFENT.SERIE
      ,PCNFENT.ESPECIE
      ,PCNFENT.CHAVENFE
      ,NVL(PCNFENT.VLTOTGER,0) AS VLTOTGER
      ,NVL(PCNFENT.VLTOTAL,0) AS VLTOTAL
      ,PCNFENT.CODFORNECFRETE
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFENT.CODFORNEC,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODCLI,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFENT.CODFORNEC,0) END AS CODCLI
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODUSUR,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFENT.CODUSURDEVOL,0) END AS CODUSUR
      ,PCMOV.COMPRACONSIGNADO
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIAL
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALNF
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALRETIRA
      ,PCMOV.NUMSEQ
      ,PCMOV.IVA
      ,PCMOV.PAUTA
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) AS BASEICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) AS PERCICM
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) / 100) AS VLICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ICMSRESSARC,0) AS ICMSRESSARC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ST,0) AS ST
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODFISCAL
      ,PCMOV.SITTRIBUT AS SITTRIBUTVENDA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICST,0) BASEICST
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0)) AS VLBASE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCDESC, 0) AS PERCDESC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0) AS VLDESCONTO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0) AS VLREPASSE
      ,PCMOV.CODDEVOL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIVA,0) AS PERCIVA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIPI,0) AS PERCIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI,0)  AS VLIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCBASERED,0) AS PERCBASERED
      ,PCMOV.PERCFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLPIS,0) AS VLPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERPIS,0) AS PERPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCOFINS,0) AS PERCOFINS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE,0) AS VLFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO,0) AS VLFRETE_RATEIO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCST,0) AS PERCST
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS1,0) AS ALIQICMS1
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS2,0) AS ALIQICMS2
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOCONT,0) AS CUSTOCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOULTENT,0) AS CUSTOULTENT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN,0) AS CUSTOFIN
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOREAL,0) AS CUSTOREAL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS,0) AS VLOUTROS
      ,PCMOV.BRINDE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP,0) AS VLOUTRASDESP
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNECPRINC
      ,PCFORNEC.FORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBFORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CGCAUX
      ,PCFORNEC.CODCOMPRADOR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBPRODUTO
      ,PCPRODUT.OBS2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODPRINC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.CODEPTO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSEC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODCATEGORIA
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSUBCATEGORIA
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') AS TIPOMERC
      ,PCPRODUT.IMPORTADO
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   END AS QTUNIT
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) END AS QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CUSTOREPTAB
      ,PCPRODUT.VOLUME
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADE
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADEMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO, 0)  AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ, 0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,PCPRODUT.SITTRIBUT
      ,TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(NVL((SELECT AF.ALIENACAO FROM PCALIENAFORNEC AF WHERE AF.CATEGORIA = 14 AND AF.REFWINTHOR = TO_CHAR(PCPRODUT.CODPROD) AND ROWNUM = 1),'0'),',','.')) AS FATOR
      ,PCMOV.DTMOV
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) END AS QUANTIDADE_MOVIMENTADA
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) END AS VALOR_UNITARIO
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
  FROM PCNFENT
      ,PCESTCOM
      ,PCNFSAID
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCFORNEC
 WHERE PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT = PCMOV.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCNFENT.NUMTRANSENT = PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSENT
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD       = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC     = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
   AND NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') NOT IN('CB')
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCNFENT.TIPODESCARGA IN('6','7','T') 
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER = 'ED' 
   AND NVL(PCNFENT.OBS,'XX') <> 'NF CANCELADA' 
   AND PCMOV.DTCANCEL IS NULL
   AND PCNFENT.CODFISCAL IN (131, 132, 231, 232, 199, 299)
   AND NVL(PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA,0) > 0
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCESTCOM.NUMTRANSVENDA
```


#### VW_INTEGRA_VENDA_CANCELADA

```sql
SELECT 3 AS TIPO_MOV_VENDA_VIEW
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMCAR
      ,PCNFSAID.CODEMITENTE
      ,PCNFSAID.CODSUPERVISOR
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM
      ,PCNFSAID.SERIE
      ,PCNFSAID.ESPECIE
      ,PCNFSAID.CHAVENFE
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMPED
      ,PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.DTENTREGA
      ,PCNFSAID.DTHORASAIDA
      ,PCNFSAID.CAIXA
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.TIPOFRETE,'C') AS TIPOFRETE
      ,PCNFSAID.PRAZOMEDIO
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTOTGER,0) AS VLTOTGER
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTOTAL,0) AS VLTOTAL
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTABELA,0) AS VLTABELA
      ,PCNFSAID.CODCOB
      ,PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMREGIAO
      ,PCNFSAID.CODFORNECFRETE
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFSAID.CODCLI,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODCLI,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFSAID.CODCLI,0) END AS CODCLI
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFSAID.CODUSUR,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODUSUR,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFSAID.CODUSUR,0) END AS CODUSUR
      ,PCMOV.COMPRACONSIGNADO
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIAL
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALNF
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALRETIRA
      ,PCMOV.NUMSEQ
      ,PCMOV.IVA
      ,PCMOV.PAUTA
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) AS BASEICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) AS PERCICM
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) / 100) AS VLICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ICMSRESSARC,0) AS ICMSRESSARC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ST,0) AS ST
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODFISCAL
      ,PCMOV.SITTRIBUT AS SITTRIBUTVENDA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICST,0) BASEICST
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0)) AS VLBASE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCDESC, 0) AS PERCDESC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0) AS VLDESCONTO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0) AS VLREPASSE
      ,PCMOV.CODDEVOL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIVA,0) AS PERCIVA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIPI,0) AS PERCIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI,0)  AS VLIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCBASERED,0) AS PERCBASERED
      ,PCMOV.PERCFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLPIS,0) AS VLPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERPIS,0) AS PERPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCOFINS,0) AS PERCOFINS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE,0) AS VLFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO,0) AS VLFRETE_RATEIO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCST,0) AS PERCST
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS1,0) AS ALIQICMS1
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS2,0) AS ALIQICMS2
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOCONT,0) AS CUSTOCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOULTENT,0) AS CUSTOULTENT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN,0) AS CUSTOFIN
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOREAL,0) AS CUSTOREAL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS,0) AS VLOUTROS
      ,PCMOV.BRINDE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP,0) AS VLOUTRASDESP
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNECPRINC
      ,PCFORNEC.FORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBFORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CGCAUX
      ,PCFORNEC.CODCOMPRADOR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBPRODUTO
      ,PCPRODUT.OBS2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODPRINC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.CODEPTO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSEC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODCATEGORIA
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSUBCATEGORIA
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') AS TIPOMERC
      ,PCPRODUT.IMPORTADO
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   END AS QTUNIT
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) END AS QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CUSTOREPTAB
      ,PCPRODUT.VOLUME
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADE
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADEMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO, 0)  AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ, 0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,PCPRODUT.SITTRIBUT
      ,TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(NVL((SELECT AF.ALIENACAO FROM PCALIENAFORNEC AF WHERE AF.CATEGORIA = 14 AND AF.REFWINTHOR = TO_CHAR(PCPRODUT.CODPROD) AND ROWNUM = 1),'0'),',','.')) AS FATOR
      ,TRUNC(NVL(PCNFCAN.DATACANC,PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL))  AS DTMOV
      ,CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA = 7 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END AS QUANTIDADE_MOVIMENTADA
      ,CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA IN(5,6,11,12) OR PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) END
            WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA = 7 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) END AS VALOR_UNITARIO
  FROM PCNFSAID
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCFORNEC
      ,PCNFCAN
 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD       = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC     = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
   AND NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') NOT IN('CB')
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER IN('S','SM','SB','ST','SR')
   AND PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA NOT IN(4,8,13,98,99)
   AND PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NOT NULL
   AND (TRUNC(NVL(PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL,TO_DATE('01/01/1900','DD/MM/YYYY'))) <> PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA)
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFCAN.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL = PCNFCAN.CODFILIAL
```


#### VW_INTEGRA_VENDA_FATU

```sql
SELECT 1 AS TIPO_MOV_VENDA_VIEW
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMCAR
      ,PCNFSAID.CODEMITENTE
      ,PCNFSAID.CODSUPERVISOR
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM
      ,PCNFSAID.SERIE
      ,PCNFSAID.ESPECIE
      ,PCNFSAID.CHAVENFE
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMPED
      ,PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.DTENTREGA
      ,PCNFSAID.DTHORASAIDA
      ,PCNFSAID.CAIXA
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.TIPOFRETE,'C') AS TIPOFRETE
      ,PCNFSAID.PRAZOMEDIO
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTOTGER,0) AS VLTOTGER
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTOTAL,0) AS VLTOTAL
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTABELA,0) AS VLTABELA
      ,PCNFSAID.CODCOB
      ,PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMREGIAO
      ,PCNFSAID.CODFORNECFRETE
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFSAID.CODCLI,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODCLI,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFSAID.CODCLI,0) END AS CODCLI
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFSAID.CODUSUR,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODUSUR,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFSAID.CODUSUR,0) END AS CODUSUR
      ,PCMOV.COMPRACONSIGNADO
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIAL
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALNF
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALRETIRA
      ,PCMOV.NUMSEQ
      ,PCMOV.IVA
      ,PCMOV.PAUTA
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) AS BASEICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) AS PERCICM
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) / 100) AS VLICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ICMSRESSARC,0) AS ICMSRESSARC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ST,0) AS ST
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODFISCAL
      ,PCMOV.SITTRIBUT AS SITTRIBUTVENDA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICST,0) BASEICST
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0)) AS VLBASE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCDESC, 0) AS PERCDESC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0) AS VLDESCONTO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0) AS VLREPASSE
      ,PCMOV.CODDEVOL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIVA,0) AS PERCIVA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIPI,0) AS PERCIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI,0)  AS VLIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCBASERED,0) AS PERCBASERED
      ,PCMOV.PERCFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLPIS,0) AS VLPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERPIS,0) AS PERPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCOFINS,0) AS PERCOFINS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE,0) AS VLFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO,0) AS VLFRETE_RATEIO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCST,0) AS PERCST
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS1,0) AS ALIQICMS1
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS2,0) AS ALIQICMS2
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOCONT,0) AS CUSTOCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOULTENT,0) AS CUSTOULTENT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN,0) AS CUSTOFIN
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOREAL,0) AS CUSTOREAL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS,0) AS VLOUTROS
      ,PCMOV.BRINDE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP,0) AS VLOUTRASDESP
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNECPRINC
      ,PCFORNEC.FORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBFORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CGCAUX
      ,PCFORNEC.CODCOMPRADOR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBPRODUTO
      ,PCPRODUT.OBS2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODPRINC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.CODEPTO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSEC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODCATEGORIA
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSUBCATEGORIA
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') AS TIPOMERC
      ,PCPRODUT.IMPORTADO
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   END AS QTUNIT
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) END AS QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CUSTOREPTAB
      ,PCPRODUT.VOLUME
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADE
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADEMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO, 0)  AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ, 0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,PCPRODUT.SITTRIBUT
      ,TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(NVL((SELECT AF.ALIENACAO FROM PCALIENAFORNEC AF WHERE AF.CATEGORIA = 14 AND AF.REFWINTHOR = TO_CHAR(PCPRODUT.CODPROD) AND ROWNUM = 1),'0'),',','.')) AS FATOR
      ,PCMOV.DTMOV
      ,CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA = 7 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END AS QUANTIDADE_MOVIMENTADA
      ,CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA IN(5,6,11,12) OR PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) END
            WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA = 7 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) END AS VALOR_UNITARIO
  FROM PCNFSAID
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCFORNEC
 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD       = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC     = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
   AND NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') NOT IN('CB')
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER IN('S','SM','SB','ST','SR')
   AND PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA NOT IN(4,8,13,98,99)
   AND PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NULL
```


#### VW_INTEGRA_VENDA_FATU_JA_CANC

```sql
SELECT 2 AS TIPO_MOV_VENDA_VIEW
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMCAR
      ,PCNFSAID.CODEMITENTE
      ,PCNFSAID.CODSUPERVISOR
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMNOTA
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMCUPOM
      ,PCNFSAID.SERIE
      ,PCNFSAID.ESPECIE
      ,PCNFSAID.CHAVENFE
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMPED
      ,PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA
      ,PCNFSAID.DTENTREGA
      ,PCNFSAID.DTHORASAIDA
      ,PCNFSAID.CAIXA
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.TIPOFRETE,'C') AS TIPOFRETE
      ,PCNFSAID.PRAZOMEDIO
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTOTGER,0) AS VLTOTGER
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTOTAL,0) AS VLTOTAL
      ,NVL(PCNFSAID.VLTABELA,0) AS VLTABELA
      ,PCNFSAID.CODCOB
      ,PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG
      ,PCNFSAID.NUMREGIAO
      ,PCNFSAID.CODFORNECFRETE
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFSAID.CODCLI,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODCLI,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFSAID.CODCLI,0) END AS CODCLI
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCNFSAID.CODUSUR,0) = 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.CODUSUR,0) ELSE NVL(PCNFSAID.CODUSUR,0) END AS CODUSUR
      ,PCMOV.COMPRACONSIGNADO
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIAL
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALNF
      ,PCMOV.CODFILIALRETIRA
      ,PCMOV.NUMSEQ
      ,PCMOV.IVA
      ,PCMOV.PAUTA
      ,PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR AS CODAUXILIARMOV
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) AS PTABELA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) AS BASEICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) AS PERCICM
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.PERCICM,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0) / 100) AS VLICMS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ICMSRESSARC,0) AS ICMSRESSARC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ST,0) AS ST
      ,PCMOV.NUMLOTE
      ,PCMOV.CODFISCAL
      ,PCMOV.SITTRIBUT AS SITTRIBUTVENDA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.BASEICST,0) BASEICST
      ,(NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) * NVL(PCMOV.BASEICMS,0)) AS VLBASE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCDESC, 0) AS PERCDESC
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLDESCONTO, 0) AS VLDESCONTO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLREPASSE, 0) AS VLREPASSE
      ,PCMOV.CODDEVOL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIVA,0) AS PERCIVA
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCIPI,0) AS PERCIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLIPI,0)  AS VLIPI
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) AS PUNITCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) AS PUNIT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCBASERED,0) AS PERCBASERED
      ,PCMOV.PERCFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLPIS,0) AS VLPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERPIS,0) AS PERPIS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCOFINS,0) AS PERCOFINS
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE,0) AS VLFRETE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLFRETE_RATEIO,0) AS VLFRETE_RATEIO
      ,NVL(PCMOV.PERCST,0) AS PERCST
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS1,0) AS ALIQICMS1
      ,NVL(PCMOV.ALIQICMS2,0) AS ALIQICMS2
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOCONT,0) AS CUSTOCONT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOULTENT,0) AS CUSTOULTENT
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOFIN,0) AS CUSTOFIN
      ,NVL(PCMOV.CUSTOREAL,0) AS CUSTOREAL
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTROS,0) AS VLOUTROS
      ,PCMOV.BRINDE
      ,NVL(PCMOV.VLOUTRASDESP,0) AS VLOUTRASDESP
      ,PCMOV.CODOPER
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC
      ,PCFORNEC.CODFORNECPRINC
      ,PCFORNEC.FORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBFORNECEDOR
      ,PCFORNEC.CGCAUX
      ,PCFORNEC.CODCOMPRADOR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODDISTRIB AS CODDISTRIBPRODUTO
      ,PCPRODUT.OBS2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPROD
      ,PCPRODUT.CODFAB
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODPRINC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODPRODMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.CODEPTO
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSEC
      ,PCPRODUT.CODCATEGORIA
      ,PCPRODUT.CODSUBCATEGORIA
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') AS TIPOMERC
      ,PCPRODUT.IMPORTADO
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT,0)   END AS QTUNIT
      ,CASE WHEN NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX,0) END AS QTUNITCX
      ,PCPRODUT.CUSTOREPTAB
      ,PCPRODUT.VOLUME
      ,PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
      ,PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADE
      ,PCPRODUT.UNIDADEMASTER
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR
      ,PCPRODUT.GTINCODAUXILIAR2
      ,PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR2
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO, 0)  AS PESOBRUTO
      ,NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOLIQ, 0) AS PESOLIQ
      ,PCPRODUT.SITTRIBUT
      ,TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(NVL((SELECT AF.ALIENACAO FROM PCALIENAFORNEC AF WHERE AF.CATEGORIA = 14 AND AF.REFWINTHOR = TO_CHAR(PCPRODUT.CODPROD) AND ROWNUM = 1),'0'),',','.')) AS FATOR
      ,PCMOV.DTMOV
      ,CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA = 7 THEN NVL(PCMOV.QTCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.QT,0) END AS QUANTIDADE_MOVIMENTADA
      ,CASE WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA IN(5,6,11,12) OR PCMOV.CODOPER = 'SB' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) > 0 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PBONIFIC,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PTABELA,0) END
            WHEN PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA = 7 THEN NVL(PCMOV.PUNITCONT,0) ELSE NVL(PCMOV.PUNIT,0) END AS VALOR_UNITARIO
  FROM PCNFSAID
      ,PCMOV
      ,PCPRODUT
      ,PCFORNEC
      ,PCNFCAN
 WHERE PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD       = PCMOV.CODPROD
   AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC     = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
   AND NVL(PCPRODUT.TIPOMERC,'XX') NOT IN('CB')
   AND (PCMOV.QT > 0 OR PCMOV.QTCONT > 0)
   AND PCMOV.CODOPER IN('S','SM','SB','ST','SR')
   AND PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA NOT IN(4,8,13,98,99)
   AND PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NOT NULL
   AND (TRUNC(NVL(PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL,TO_DATE('01/01/1900','DD/MM/YYYY'))) <> PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA)
   AND PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFCAN.NUMTRANSVENDA
   AND PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL = PCNFCAN.CODFILIAL
```


#### VW_METAS

```sql
SELECT
       PCUSUARI.CODUSUR,
       PCMETA.CODFILIAL,
       PCMETA.CODIGO,
       PCMETA.DATA,
       PCMETA.TIPOMETA,
       NVL(PCMETA.VLVENDAPREV, 0) VLMETA,
       NVL(PCMETA.QTVENDAPREV, 0) QTMETA,
       NVL(PCMETA.QTPESOPREV, 0) QTPESOMETA,
       NVL(PCMETA.MIXPREV, 0) MIXPREV,
       NVL(PCMETA.CLIPOSPREV, 0) CLIPOSPREV
      FROM PCMETA, PCUSUARI
     WHERE PCMETA.CODUSUR = PCUSUARI.CODUSUR
```


#### VW_OSVEICULO

```sql
SELECT V.CODOSVEICULO                                                                     
     , V.PLACA                                                                            
     , A.CODOSMARCA                                                                       
     , A.MARCA                                                                            
     , V.CODOSMODELO                                                                      
     , M.MODELO                                                                           
     , V.ANO                                                                              
     , NVL((SELECT MAX(KM) FROM PCORDEMSERVICO WHERE CODOSVEICULO = V.CODOSVEICULO),0) KM 
     , V.CODOSCOMBUSTIVEL                                                                 
     , C.COMBUSTIVEL                                                                      
     , V.MOTOR                                                                            
     , V.OBS                                                                              
     , V.DTCADASTRO                                                                       
     , A.MARCA || '/' || M.MODELO || '/' || V.ANO DESCVEICULO                         
  FROM PCOSVEICULO V                                                                      
     , PCOSVEICULOMODELO M                                                                
     , PCOSVEICULOMARCA A                                                                 
     , PCOSVEICULOCOMBUSTIVEL C                                                           
 WHERE M.CODOSMARCA = A.CODOSMARCA                                                        
   AND V.CODOSMODELO = M.CODOSMODELO                                                      
   AND V.CODOSCOMBUSTIVEL = C.CODOSCOMBUSTIVEL
```


#### VW_PARAM_CLASSIFICMERC

```sql
SELECT
  (SELECT MAX(VALOR) FROM PCPARAMFILIAL WHERE NOME = 'UTILIZATRIBUTSUBCAT') UTILIZATRIBUTSUBCAT,
  (SELECT MAX(VALOR) FROM PCPARAMFILIAL WHERE NOME = 'UTILIZAMARGEMSUBCAT') UTILIZAMARGEMSUBCAT,
  (SELECT MAX(VALOR) FROM PCPARAMFILIAL WHERE NOME = 'CON_USATRIBUTACAOPORUF') UTILIZATRIBUTACAOPORUF
FROM
  DUAL
```


#### VW_PCBANCOFILIAIS

```sql
(SELECT DISTINCT BF1.CODBANCO,
        DECODE(BF2.QDTFILIAIS,1, BF1.CODFILIAL, '99') CODFILIAL,
        (SELECT REPLACE(TO_CHAR(CONCAT_COLUNA(BF3.CODFILIAL)),',',',')
         FROM PCBANCOFILIAIS BF3 
         WHERE BF3.CODBANCO = BF1.CODBANCO) FILIAISVINCULADAS
 FROM PCBANCOFILIAIS BF1,
      (SELECT COUNT(CODBANCO) QDTFILIAIS, CODBANCO
       FROM PCBANCOFILIAIS
       GROUP BY CODBANCO) BF2
 WHERE BF1.CODBANCO = BF2.CODBANCO)
```


#### VW_PCCRECLI

```sql
SELECT C."CODCLI",C."DTLANC",C."CODFILIAL",C."NUMNOTA",C."NUMTRANSVENDA",C."SERIE",C."VALOR",C."DTDESCONTO",C."CODFILIALDESC",C."NUMNOTADESC",C."SERIEDESC",C."CODFUNC",C."HORA",C."MINUTO",C."ORIGEM",C."NUMTRANSVENDADESC",C."NUMTRANSENTDEVCLI",C."HISTORICO",C."CODFUNCLANC",C."NUMPED",C."NUMERARIO",C."CODMOVIMENTO",C."NUMLANCBAIXA",C."NUMTRANSBAIXA",C."NUMLANC",C."NUMTRANS",C."SITUACAO",C."NUMINDENIZ",C."CODROTINA",C."PRESTRESTCLI",C."NUMPEDECF",C."NUMCAIXA",C."CODFUNCCX",C."NUMSERIEEQUIP",C."CODIGO",C."VALORESTORNOLIBERADO",C."OBS",C."CODADMCARTAO",C."NUMCUPOM",C."NSUTEF",C."BIN",C."CODCLIORIG",C."NUMGIFTCARD",C."DTEMISSAOTITULO",C."NUMCRED",C."DTESTORNO",C."ROTINAINSERT",C."ROTINAULTIMAALTERACAO",C."ROTINAESTORNO",C."ROTINABAIXA",C."DTVENC",C."PRESTORIG", 'A' STATUSCREDITO  
  
         
FROM PCCRECLI C
WHERE C.DTDESCONTO IS NULL 

AND   C.DTESTORNO  IS NULL
UNION
--CREDITOS BAIXADOS
SELECT C."CODCLI",C."DTLANC",C."CODFILIAL",C."NUMNOTA",C."NUMTRANSVENDA",C."SERIE",C."VALOR",C."DTDESCONTO",C."CODFILIALDESC",C."NUMNOTADESC",C."SERIEDESC",C."CODFUNC",C."HORA",C."MINUTO",C."ORIGEM",C."NUMTRANSVENDADESC",C."NUMTRANSENTDEVCLI",C."HISTORICO",C."CODFUNCLANC",C."NUMPED",C."NUMERARIO",C."CODMOVIMENTO",C."NUMLANCBAIXA",C."NUMTRANSBAIXA",C."NUMLANC",C."NUMTRANS",C."SITUACAO",C."NUMINDENIZ",C."CODROTINA",C."PRESTRESTCLI",C."NUMPEDECF",C."NUMCAIXA",C."CODFUNCCX",C."NUMSERIEEQUIP",C."CODIGO",C."VALORESTORNOLIBERADO",C."OBS",C."CODADMCARTAO",C."NUMCUPOM",C."NSUTEF",C."BIN",C."CODCLIORIG",C."NUMGIFTCARD",C."DTEMISSAOTITULO",C."NUMCRED",C."DTESTORNO",C."ROTINAINSERT",C."ROTINAULTIMAALTERACAO",C."ROTINAESTORNO",C."ROTINABAIXA",C."DTVENC",C."PRESTORIG", 'B' STATUSCREDITO  
  
         
FROM PCCRECLI C
WHERE C.DTDESCONTO IS NOT 
NULL 
AND   C.DTESTORNO  IS NULL
UNION 
--CREDITOS ESTORNADOS
SELECT C."CODCLI",C."DTLANC",C."CODFILIAL",C."NUMNOTA",C."NUMTRANSVENDA",C."SERIE",C."VALOR",C."DTDESCONTO",C."CODFILIALDESC",C."NUMNOTADESC",C."SERIEDESC",C."CODFUNC",C."HORA",C."MINUTO",C."ORIGEM",C."NUMTRANSVENDADESC",C."NUMTRANSENTDEVCLI",C."HISTORICO",C."CODFUNCLANC",C."NUMPED",C."NUMERARIO",C."CODMOVIMENTO",C."NUMLANCBAIXA",C."NUMTRANSBAIXA",C."NUMLANC",C."NUMTRANS",C."SITUACAO",C."NUMINDENIZ",C."CODROTINA",C."PRESTRESTCLI",C."NUMPEDECF",C."NUMCAIXA",C."CODFUNCCX",C."NUMSERIEEQUIP",C."CODIGO",C."VALORESTORNOLIBERADO",C."OBS",C."CODADMCARTAO",C."NUMCUPOM",C."NSUTEF",C."BIN",C."CODCLIORIG",C."NUMGIFTCARD",C."DTEMISSAOTITULO",C."NUMCRED",C."DTESTORNO",C."ROTINAINSERT",C."ROTINAULTIMAALTERACAO",C."ROTINAESTORNO",C."ROTINABAIXA",C."DTVENC",C."PRESTORIG", 'E' STATUSCREDITO   
 
         
FROM PCCRECLI C
WHERE C.DTDESCONTO IS NOT 
NULL 
AND   C.DTESTORNO  IS NOT 
NULL
```


#### VW_PRECIFICACAO

```sql
SELECT BASEPRECO."CODPROD",BASEPRECO."DESCRICAO",BASEPRECO."EMBALAGEM",BASEPRECO."UNIDADE",BASEPRECO."NUMREGIAO",BASEPRECO."NUMREGIAOPADRAO",BASEPRECO."REGIAO",BASEPRECO."CODFORNEC",BASEPRECO."CODEPTO",BASEPRECO."CODSEC",BASEPRECO."FORNECEDOR",BASEPRECO."CODFILIAL",BASEPRECO."RAZAOSOCIAL",BASEPRECO."INCLUIRCOMISSAOSUGPVENDACMV",BASEPRECO."VALORULTENT",BASEPRECO."CUSTOULTENT",BASEPRECO."CUSTOREAL",BASEPRECO."CUSTOFIN",BASEPRECO."CUSTOULTPEDCOMPRA",BASEPRECO."CUSTOULTENTFIN",BASEPRECO."CUSTOCONT",BASEPRECO."QTULTENT",BASEPRECO."CUSTONFSEMST",BASEPRECO."CUSTOPROXIMACOMPRA",BASEPRECO."CUSTOFORNEC",BASEPRECO."PVENDA",BASEPRECO."PVENDA1",BASEPRECO."PVENDA2",BASEPRECO."PVENDA3",BASEPRECO."PVENDA4",BASEPRECO."PVENDA5",BASEPRECO."PVENDA6",BASEPRECO."PVENDA7",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC1",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC2",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC3",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC4",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC5",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC6",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC7",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTPVENDA",BASEPRECO."PCOMPRA",BASEPRECO."PRECIFICESTRANGEIRA",BASEPRECO."COTACAO",BASEPRECO."BASEICMSULTENT",BASEPRECO."PERCIPIVENDATAB",BASEPRECO."VLPAUTAIPIVENDA",BASEPRECO."VLPAUTAIPIVENDATAB",BASEPRECO."VLIPIPORKGVENDA",BASEPRECO."VLIPIPORKGVENDATAB",BASEPRECO."PESOBRUTO",BASEPRECO."DTULTENT",BASEPRECO."PERFRETEESPECIAL",BASEPRECO."PERFRETETERCEIROS",BASEPRECO."VLFRETEKG",BASEPRECO."PRECOFIXO",BASEPRECO."QTUNIT",BASEPRECO."PERDESCMAX",BASEPRECO."PERDESCMAXTAB",BASEPRECO."PERDESCMAXTABBALCAO",BASEPRECO."PERDESCMAXBALCAO",BASEPRECO."MARGEM",BASEPRECO."CODICMTAB",BASEPRECO."PTABELA",BASEPRECO."QTESTOQUE",BASEPRECO."GIRODIA",BASEPRECO."PERDESCCUSTO",BASEPRECO."PCOMREP1",BASEPRECO."QTESTGER",BASEPRECO."QTPEDIDA",BASEPRECO."QTRESERV",BASEPRECO."QTINDENIZ",BASEPRECO."QTBLOQUEADA",BASEPRECO."VLTOTCUSTOULTENT",BASEPRECO."VLTOTCUSTOFIN",BASEPRECO."VLTOTCUSTOREP",BASEPRECO."QTVENDDIA",BASEPRECO."QTVENDMES",BASEPRECO."QTVENDMES1",BASEPRECO."QTVENDMES2",BASEPRECO."QTVENDMES3",BASEPRECO."QTVENDSEMANA",BASEPRECO."QTVENDSEMANA1",BASEPRECO."QTVENDSEMANA2",BASEPRECO."QTVENDSEMANA3",BASEPRECO."QTUNITCX",BASEPRECO."FRETEESPECIAL",BASEPRECO."CLASSE",BASEPRECO."TIPOPRECIFICACAO",BASEPRECO."DESCONTAFRETE",BASEPRECO."PFRETE",BASEPRECO."TIPOCALCULOGNRETAB",BASEPRECO."PERDESTAB",BASEPRECO."VLACRESFRETEKG",BASEPRECO."PERCACRESCIMOFRETE",BASEPRECO."PERCIPIVENDA",BASEPRECO."PERCBASEREDST",BASEPRECO."PERFRETE",BASEPRECO."PAUTATAB",BASEPRECO."IVATAB",BASEPRECO."ALIQICMS1TAB",BASEPRECO."ALIQICMS2TAB",BASEPRECO."CODICMANTECIPADO",BASEPRECO."CALCULARIPIVENDA",BASEPRECO."VLST",BASEPRECO."VLSTTAB",BASEPRECO."TXVENDA",BASEPRECO."TAXA0",BASEPRECO."TAXA7",BASEPRECO."TAXA14",BASEPRECO."TAXA21",BASEPRECO."TAXA28",BASEPRECO."TAXA35",BASEPRECO."TAXA42",BASEPRECO."CUSTOSELECIONADO"
     /* Margem de precificação */
     , ((BASEPRECO.PVENDA -- Preço de venda 
      - BASEPRECO.CUSTOSELECIONADO -- Custo paraemtrizado na 132
      + (BASEPRECO.CUSTOSELECIONADO * -- Desconto do custo 
        (BASEPRECO.PERDESCCUSTO / 100)) 
      - (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * -- Taxa de venda 
        (BASEPRECO.TXVENDA / 100))                    
      - ((BASEPRECO.PVENDA - (DECODE(BASEPRECO.DESCONTAFRETE, 'S', BASEPRECO.PFRETE, 0))) * -- Frete
         (CASE WHEN BASEPRECO.CUSTOREAL <> 0  
               THEN (((BASEPRECO.VLFRETEKG * BASEPRECO.PESOBRUTO) / BASEPRECO.CUSTOREAL) * 100)
               ELSE 0
          END))
      - (CASE WHEN INCLUIRCOMISSAOSUGPVENDACMV = 'S' -- Comissão 
              THEN (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * (BASEPRECO.PCOMREP1 / 100))                    
              ELSE 0
         END) 
      - (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * (BASEPRECO.CODICMTAB / 100)) -- Impostos 
      - (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * ((CASE WHEN BASEPRECO.FRETEESPECIAL = 'S'
                                   THEN BASEPRECO.PERFRETEESPECIAL
                                   ELSE BASEPRECO.PERFRETETERCEIROS
                              END) / 100))) 
         
      / (DECODE(BASEPRECO.PVENDA,0,1,BASEPRECO.PVENDA))) * 100 MARGEMPRECIFICACAO
  FROM (SELECT PCPRODUT.CODPROD
             , PCPRODUT.DESCRICAO
             , PCPRODUT.EMBALAGEM
             , PCPRODUT.UNIDADE
             , PCREGIAO.NUMREGIAO
             , NVL(PCFILIAL.NUMREGIAOPADRAO,PCCONSUM.NUMREGIAOPADRAO) NUMREGIAOPADRAO
             , PCREGIAO.REGIAO
             , PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC
             , PCPRODUT.CODEPTO
             , PCPRODUT.CODSEC
             , PCFORNEC.FORNECEDOR
             , PCEST.CODFILIAL
             , PCFILIAL.RAZAOSOCIAL
             , NVL(PCCONSUM.INCLUIRCOMISSAOSUGPVENDACMV,'S') INCLUIRCOMISSAOSUGPVENDACMV
             /* Custos */ 
             , NVL(PCEST.VALORULTENT, 0) VALORULTENT
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENT, 0) CUSTOULTENT
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTOREAL, 0) CUSTOREAL
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTOFIN, 0) CUSTOFIN
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTPEDCOMPRA, 0) CUSTOULTPEDCOMPRA
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENTFIN, 0) CUSTOULTENTFIN
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTOCONT, 0) CUSTOCONT
             , NVL(PCEST.QTULTENT, 0) QTULTENT
             , NVL(PCEST.CUSTONFSEMST, 0) CUSTONFSEMST
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.CUSTOPROXIMACOMPRA, 0) CUSTOPROXIMACOMPRA
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.CUSTOFORNEC, 0) CUSTOFORNEC
             /* Preço varejo */ 
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA, 0) AS PVENDA
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA1,0) AS PVENDA1
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA2,0) AS PVENDA2
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA3,0) AS PVENDA3
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA4,0) AS PVENDA4
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA5,0) AS PVENDA5
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA6,0) AS PVENDA6
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDA7,0) AS PVENDA7
             /* Preço atacado */ 
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC, 0) AS PVENDAATAC
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC1,0) AS PVENDAATAC1
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC2,0) AS PVENDAATAC2 
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC3,0) AS PVENDAATAC3  
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC4,0) AS PVENDAATAC4  
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC5,0) AS PVENDAATAC5  
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC6,0) AS PVENDAATAC6  
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PVENDAATAC7,0) AS PVENDAATAC7  
             , PCTABPR.DTULTALTPVENDA
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.CUSTOREP, 0) PCOMPRA    
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.PRECIFICESTRANGEIRA, 'N') PRECIFICESTRANGEIRA
             , NVL(PCCOTACAOMOEDAI.COTACAO, 0) COTACAO
             , NVL(PCEST.BASEICMSULTENT, 0) BASEICMSULTENT
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.PERCIPIVENDATAB, 0) PERCIPIVENDATAB
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.VLPAUTAIPIVENDA, 0) VLPAUTAIPIVENDA
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.VLPAUTAIPIVENDATAB, 0) VLPAUTAIPIVENDATAB
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.VLIPIPORKGVENDA, 0) VLIPIPORKGVENDA
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.VLIPIPORKGVENDATAB, 0)  VLIPIPORKGVENDATAB
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.PESOBRUTO, 0) PESOBRUTO
             , PCEST.DTULTENT
             , NVL(PCREGIAO.PERFRETEESPECIAL, 0) PERFRETEESPECIAL
             , NVL(PCREGIAO.PERFRETETERCEIROS, 0) PERFRETETERCEIROS
             , NVL(PCREGIAO.VLFRETEKG, 0) VLFRETEKG
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.PRECOFIXO, 'N') PRECOFIXO
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNIT, 0) QTUNIT
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PERDESCMAX, 0) PERDESCMAX
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PERDESCMAXTAB, 0) PERDESCMAXTAB
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PERDESCMAXTABBALCAO, 0) PERDESCMAXTABBALCAO
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PERDESCMAXBALCAO, 0) PERDESCMAXBALCAO
             , NVL(PCTABPR.MARGEM, 0) MARGEM
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.CODICMTAB, 0) CODICMTAB
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PTABELA, 0) PTABELA
             , (NVL(PCEST.QTESTGER, 0) - NVL(PCEST.QTRESERV, 0) - NVL(PCEST.QTBLOQUEADA, 0)) QTESTOQUE
             , NVL(PCEST.QTGIRODIA, 0) GIRODIA
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.PERDESCCUSTO, 0) PERDESCCUSTO
             , CASE WHEN PARAMFILIAL.OBTERCOMOVARCHAR2('USACOMISSAOFILIALPRECIFIC') = 'N'
                    THEN NVL(PCPRODFILIAL.PCOMREP1, NVL(PCPRODUT.PCOMREP1,0)) 
                    ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.PCOMREP1, 0) 
               END       PCOMREP1
             /* Estoque */
             , NVL(PCEST.QTESTGER, 0) QTESTGER
             , NVL(PCEST.QTPEDIDA, 0) QTPEDIDA
             , NVL(PCEST.QTRESERV, 0) QTRESERV
             , NVL(PCEST.QTINDENIZ, 0) QTINDENIZ
             , NVL(PCEST.QTBLOQUEADA, 0) QTBLOQUEADA
              , ((PCEST.QTESTGER - PCEST.QTRESERV - NVL(PCEST.QTINDENIZ, 0)) * PCEST.VALORULTENT) AS VLTOTCUSTOULTENT
             , ((PCEST.QTESTGER - PCEST.QTRESERV - NVL(PCEST.QTINDENIZ, 0)) * PCEST.CUSTOFIN) AS VLTOTCUSTOFIN
             , ((PCEST.QTESTGER - PCEST.QTRESERV - NVL(PCEST.QTINDENIZ, 0)) * PCEST.CUSTOREP) AS VLTOTCUSTOREP
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDDIA, 0) QTVENDDIA
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDMES, 0) QTVENDMES
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDMES1, 0) QTVENDMES1
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDMES2, 0) QTVENDMES2
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDMES3, 0) QTVENDMES3
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDSEMANA, 0) QTVENDSEMANA
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDSEMANA1, 0) QTVENDSEMANA1
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDSEMANA2, 0) QTVENDSEMANA2
             , NVL(PCEST.QTVENDSEMANA3, 0) QTVENDSEMANA3
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.QTUNITCX, 1) QTUNITCX
             /* Calculo da margem */
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.FRETEESPECIAL, 'N') FRETEESPECIAL
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.CLASSE, 'C') CLASSE
             , NVL(PCFILIAL.TIPOPRECIFICACAO, 'P') TIPOPRECIFICACAO
             , NVL(PCTABPR.DESCONTAFRETE,'N') DESCONTAFRETE
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PFRETE, 0) PFRETE
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.TIPOCALCULOGNRETAB, 'P') TIPOCALCULOGNRETAB
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.PERDESTAB, 0) PERDESTAB
             , NVL(PCTABPR.VLACRESFRETEKG, 0) VLACRESFRETEKG
             , NVL(PCTABPR.PERCACRESCIMOFRETE, 0) PERCACRESCIMOFRETE
             , NVL(PCPRODUT.PERCIPIVENDA, 0) PERCIPIVENDA
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.PERCBASEREDST, 0) PERCBASEREDST
             , NVL(PCREGIAO.PERFRETE, 0) PERFRETE
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.PAUTATAB, 0) PAUTATAB
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.IVATAB, 0) IVATAB
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.ALIQICMS1TAB, 0) ALIQICMS1TAB
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.ALIQICMS2TAB, 0) ALIQICMS2TAB
             , NVL(PCTRIBUT.CODICMANTECIPADO, 0) CODICMANTECIPADO
             , NVL(PCFILIAL.CALCULARIPIVENDA, 'S')  CALCULARIPIVENDA
             , NVL(PCTABPR.VLST, 0) VLST
             , NVL(PCTABPR.VLSTTAB, 0) VLSTTAB
             , NVL(PCCONSUM.TXVENDA,0) TXVENDA
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA0
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA0
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA0) TAXA0
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA7
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA7
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA7) TAXA7
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA14
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA14
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA14) TAXA14
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA21
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA21
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA21) TAXA21
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA28
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA28
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA28) TAXA28
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA35
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA35
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA35) TAXA35
             , DECODE(NVL(PCCONSUM.TAXATABPR, 'P')
                    , 'R', PCFORNEC.TAXA42
                    , 'F', PCFILIAL.TAXA42
                    , 'P', PCCONSUM.TAXA42) TAXA42
             , DECODE( (CASE WHEN (NVL(PCPRODUT.SUGVENDA, 0) <= 0) THEN NVL(PCCONSUM.SUGVENDA, 3) ELSE NVL(PCPRODUT.SUGVENDA, 0) END),        
                                0, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENT,0),                                                                                                 
                                1, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOREAL,0),                                                                                                   
                                2, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOFIN,0),                                                                                                    
                                3, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENT,0),                                                                                                 
                                4, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTPEDCOMPRA,0),                                                                                           
                                5, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENTFIN,0),                                                                                              
                                6, NVL(PCEST.CUSTOPROXIMACOMPRA,0),                                                                                          
                                8, (CASE WHEN (NVL(PCEST.CUSTOREAL,0) > NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENT,0)) 
                                         THEN NVL(PCEST.CUSTOREAL, 0) 
                                         ELSE NVL(PCEST.CUSTOULTENT,0) 
                                    END), 
                              7, NVL(PCPRODUT.CUSTOFORNEC,0)) CUSTOSELECIONADO

          FROM PCPRODUT
             , PCEST
             , PCPRODFILIAL
             , PCTABPR
             , PCTRIBUT
             , PCFORNEC
             , PCFILIAL
             , PCREGIAO
             , PCCONSUM
             , PCCOTACAOMOEDAI
         WHERE PCPRODUT.CODPROD   = PCEST.CODPROD
           AND PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC = PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC
           AND PCPRODUT.CODPROD   = PCTABPR.CODPROD
           AND PCTABPR.NUMREGIAO  = PCREGIAO.NUMREGIAO
           AND PCEST.CODFILIAL    = PCFILIAL.CODIGO
           AND PCEST.CODFILIAL    = PCPRODFILIAL.CODFILIAL
           AND PCEST.CODPROD      = PCPRODFILIAL.CODPROD
           AND PCEST.DTULTENT     = PCCOTACAOMOEDAI.DATACOTACAO(+)
           AND PCTRIBUT.CODST     = (CASE WHEN PCCONSUM.USATRIBUTACAOPORUF = 'N'
                                          THEN PCTABPR.CODST
                                          ELSE (SELECT PCTABTRIB.CODST
                                                  FROM PCTABTRIB
                                                 WHERE PCTABTRIB.UFDESTINO   = PCREGIAO.UF    
                                                   AND PCTABTRIB.CODFILIALNF = PCEST.CODFILIAL
                                                   AND PCTABTRIB.CODPROD     = PCEST.CODPROD
                                                   AND ROWNUM = 1)
                                     END) 
           ) BASEPRECO
```


#### VW_PRECIFICACAO_EMBALAGEM

```sql
SELECT BASEPRECO."CODAUXILIAR",BASEPRECO."DESCRICAOECF",BASEPRECO."CODPROD",BASEPRECO."RID",BASEPRECO."DESCRICAO",BASEPRECO."SUGVENDA",BASEPRECO."UNIDADE",BASEPRECO."NUMREGIAOPADRAO",BASEPRECO."QTUNIT",BASEPRECO."QTUNITPROD",BASEPRECO."QTUNITCX",BASEPRECO."PVENDA",BASEPRECO."PVENDAWEB",BASEPRECO."PTABELAWEB",BASEPRECO."SITUACAOWEB",BASEPRECO."MARGEM_ESP",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTPTABELA",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTPVENDA",BASEPRECO."CODFUNCALTPTABELA",BASEPRECO."CODFUNCALTPVENDA",BASEPRECO."PERFRETEESPECIAL",BASEPRECO."PERFRETETERCEIROS",BASEPRECO."VLACRESFRETEKG",BASEPRECO."PERCIPIVENDATAB",BASEPRECO."VLPAUTAIPIVENDATAB",BASEPRECO."VLIPIPORKGVENDATAB",BASEPRECO."USAPMCBASEST",BASEPRECO."PRECOMAXCONSUMTAB",BASEPRECO."PRECOMAXCONSUM",BASEPRECO."PERCACRESCIMOFRETE",BASEPRECO."PERCBASEREDST",BASEPRECO."PERFRETE",BASEPRECO."PERDESTAB",BASEPRECO."IVATAB",BASEPRECO."PAUTATAB",BASEPRECO."ALIQICMS1TAB",BASEPRECO."ALIQICMS2TAB",BASEPRECO."CODICMANTECIPADO",BASEPRECO."PERCDIFALIQUOTASTAB",BASEPRECO."CALCULARIPIVENDA",BASEPRECO."USAVALORULTENTBASEST2",BASEPRECO."USAVALORULTENTBASEST",BASEPRECO."QTESTGER",BASEPRECO."QTRESERV",BASEPRECO."QTINDENIZ",BASEPRECO."GIRODIA",BASEPRECO."QTBLOQUEADA",BASEPRECO."VALORULTENT",BASEPRECO."CUSTONFSEMST",BASEPRECO."CUSTOULTPEDCOMPRA",BASEPRECO."CUSTOULTENTFIN",BASEPRECO."CUSTOCONT",BASEPRECO."CUSTOPROXIMACOMPRA",BASEPRECO."CUSTOFORNEC",BASEPRECO."CUSTOULTENT",BASEPRECO."CUSTOFIN",BASEPRECO."CUSTOREAL",BASEPRECO."FRETEESPECIAL",BASEPRECO."TIPOCALCIPI",BASEPRECO."PFRETE",BASEPRECO."DESCONTAFRETE",BASEPRECO."TIPOCALCULOGNRETAB",BASEPRECO."QTMAXVENDA",BASEPRECO."CALCULARSTCOMIPI",BASEPRECO."USAICMSANTECIPPVENDA",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTCOM",BASEPRECO."CODFILIAL",BASEPRECO."POFERTAATAC",BASEPRECO."CODOFERTA",BASEPRECO."POFERTA",BASEPRECO."DTOFERTAINI",BASEPRECO."DTOFERTAFIM",BASEPRECO."PRECOANTERIOR",BASEPRECO."EXCLUIDO",BASEPRECO."PERMITEMULTIPLICACAO",BASEPRECO."USABALANCATOLEDO",BASEPRECO."TIPOEMBALAGEM",BASEPRECO."DTEMISSAOETIQ",BASEPRECO."QTMINGONDOLA",BASEPRECO."NUMSEQATU",BASEPRECO."FATORPRECO",BASEPRECO."TIPOPRECIFICACAO",BASEPRECO."INCLUIRCOMISSAOSUGPVENDACMV",BASEPRECO."REPLICARPRECOPOREMBALAGEM",BASEPRECO."TXVENDA",BASEPRECO."USACOMISSAOECF",BASEPRECO."USATRIBUTACAOPORUF",BASEPRECO."PRECIFICAAUTOMATICO",BASEPRECO."PTABELAATAC",BASEPRECO."PVENDAATAC",BASEPRECO."PRECOANTERIORATAC",BASEPRECO."QTMINIMAATACADO",BASEPRECO."QTMINIMAATACADOF",BASEPRECO."ENVIAFV",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTPTABELAATAC",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTPVENDAATAC",BASEPRECO."MARGEMATAC",BASEPRECO."MARGEMIDEALATAC",BASEPRECO."DTULTALTERSRVPRC",BASEPRECO."FATORCONVERSAO",BASEPRECO."UNMEDIDA",BASEPRECO."EMBALAGEM",BASEPRECO."ACEITAPRECOREPLICADO",BASEPRECO."DTOFERTAATACINI",BASEPRECO."DTOFERTAATACFIM",BASEPRECO."PESOBRUTO",BASEPRECO."DTINATIVO",BASEPRECO."MOTIVOOFERTA",BASEPRECO."CODPRODPRINC",BASEPRECO."TIPOMERC",BASEPRECO."CODDEPTOWEB",BASEPRECO."CODSECAOWEB",BASEPRECO."CODCATEGORIAWEB",BASEPRECO."CODSUBCATEGORIAWEB",BASEPRECO."OBS",BASEPRECO."OBS2",BASEPRECO."CODICMTAB",BASEPRECO."PERDESCCUSTO",BASEPRECO."PCOMREP1",BASEPRECO."VLFRETEKG",BASEPRECO."PRECOFIXO",BASEPRECO."MARGEMATAC_ESP",BASEPRECO."PERDESCCARTAOFIDELIDADE",BASEPRECO."QTMULTIPLA",BASEPRECO."PERVARIACAOPTABELA",BASEPRECO."PTABELA",BASEPRECO."CODFORNEC",BASEPRECO."FORNECEDOR",BASEPRECO."MARGEM",BASEPRECO."MARGEMMIN"
    ,(BASEPRECO.CUSTOSELECIONADO * decode(BASEPRECO.QTUNIT,0,1,BASEPRECO.QTUNIT)) CUSTOSELECIONADO -- Custo paraemtrizado na 132
           /* Margem de precificação */
     , ROUND(((BASEPRECO.PVENDA -- Preço de venda
      - (BASEPRECO.CUSTOSELECIONADO * decode(BASEPRECO.QTUNIT,0,1,BASEPRECO.QTUNIT)) -- Custo paraemtrizado na 132
      + ((BASEPRECO.CUSTOSELECIONADO * decode(BASEPRECO.QTUNIT,0,1,BASEPRECO.QTUNIT)) * -- Desconto do custo
        (BASEPRECO.PERDESCCUSTO / 100))
      - (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * -- Taxa de venda
        (BASEPRECO.TXVENDA / 100))
      - ((BASEPRECO.PVENDA - (DECODE(BASEPRECO.DESCONTAFRETE, 'S', BASEPRECO.PFRETE, 0))) * -- Frete
         (CASE WHEN BASEPRECO.CUSTOREAL <> 0
               THEN (((BASEPRECO.VLFRETEKG * BASEPRECO.PESOBRUTO) / BASEPRECO.CUSTOREAL) * 100)
               ELSE 0
          END))
      - (CASE WHEN INCLUIRCOMISSAOSUGPVENDACMV = 'S' -- Comissão
              THEN (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * (BASEPRECO.PCOMREP1 / 100))
              ELSE 0
         END)
      - (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * (BASEPRECO.CODICMTAB / 100)) -- Impostos
      - (BASEPRECO.PVENDA * ((CASE WHEN BASEPRECO.FRETEESPECIAL = 'S'
                                   THEN BASEPRECO.PERFRETEESPECIAL
                                   ELSE BASEPRECO.PERFRETETERCEIROS
                              END) / 100)))

      / (DECODE(BASEPRECO.PVENDA,0,1,BASEPRECO.PVENDA))) * 100,2) MARGEMPRECIFICACAO

      ,FORMATARULTIMODIGPRECO(BASEPRECO.CODFILIAL, ROUND((BASEPRECO.CUSTOSELECIONADO / (1 - (BASEPRECO.TXVENDA / 100) --Imposto federal
```
